title: FAT Analyst - GF
raw_description:
Finance

  • Mengawasi arus kas perusahaan, termasuk pembayaran dan penerimaan.
  • Menyusun proyeksi keuangan dan memantau realisasi anggaran.
  • Mengendalikan biaya operasional serta memastikan efisiensi keuangan.
  • Berkoordinasi dengan bank, vendor, dan pihak eksternal terkait urusan keuangan.

Accounting

  • Mengawasi pencatatan transaksi keuangan sesuai standar akuntansi yang berlaku.
  • Memastikan proses penutupan buku bulanan dan tahunan dilakukan tepat waktu dan akurat.Menelaah laporan keuangan (Neraca, Laporan Laba Rugi, dan Arus Kas).
  • Memantau rekonsiliasi bank, piutang usaha, utang usaha, dan aset tetap.
  • Memastikan seluruh dokumen keuangan lengkap dan tertata dengan baik.

Tax

  • Menghitung, melaporkan, dan membayarkan pajak (PPh, PPN, dan pajak lainnya).
  • Memastikan kepatuhan terhadap peraturan perpajakan yang berlaku.
  • Menyiapkan data dan dokumen untuk keperluan pemeriksaan pajak.
  • Berkoordinasi dengan konsultan pajak dan otoritas pajak apabila diperlukan.
  • SupervisoryMengawasi dan mengembangkan tim Finance & Accounting.
  • Membagi tugas, memantau kinerja, serta memberikan arahan dan pembinaan.
  • Menyusun laporan dan rekomendasi kepada Head of FAT dan Manajemen.
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal S1 Akuntansi, Keuangan, Perpajakan, atau bidang terkait.
  • Pengalaman kerja 3 sampai 5 tahun di bidang Finance, Accounting, atau Tax, diutamakan memiliki pengalaman supervisi.
  • Memiliki pemahaman yang kuat mengenai prinsip akuntansi (PSAK), pelaporan keuangan, dan peraturan perpajakan di Indonesia.
  • Memahami proses perpajakan, termasuk perhitungan dan pelaporan PPh.
  • Berpengalaman atau memahami administrasi perbankan serta aktivitas treasury.
  • Mahir menggunakan Microsoft Excel dan software akuntansi.
  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis yang baik, teliti, serta mampu memecahkan masalah.
  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan kepemimpinan yang baik, serta mampu berkoordinasi dengan pihak internal maupun eksternal.
  • Menjunjung tinggi integritas, profesionalisme, dan komitmen terhadap praktik kerja yang etis.

title: SDET - Contract-based - ADMO
raw_description:
1. Melakukan validasi terhadap requirement yang telah disusun oleh Product Manager.
  2. Merancang test scenario berdasarkan requirement yang telah disepakati dengan menggunakan teknik design test.
  3. Bekerja sama dengan Developer dan Designer untuk menyusun API kontrak dan UI design.
  4. Mempersiapkan data pengujian dan user account yang akan dibutuhkan untuk mengembangkan script pengujian otomatis.
  5. Menyusun dan memelihara dokumentasi pengujian, termasuk kasus uji dan skrip pengujian.
  6. Merancang, mengembangkan, dan memelihara (maintain) skrip pengujian otomatis, baik fungsional (tes integrasi dan tes end-to-end) maupun non-fungsional (kinerja dan beban kerja) terhadap frontend dan backend untuk memastikan bahwa fitur aplikasi berfungsi sesuai spesifikasi.
  7. Menggunakan alat dan kerangka kerja pengujian otomatis seperti Jest, Playwright, WebDriverIO, Appium, dan BrowserStack.
  8. Melaporkan dan mendokumentasikan hasil pengujian, termasuk bug yang ditemukan, selama pengembangan pernagkat lunak kepada tim pengembangan produk.
raw_requirements:
1. Lulusan Sarjana di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau bidang terkait lainnya dengan IPK minimal 3,00 / 4,00.
  2. Mampu menerapkan teknik Desain Pengujian dalam pembuatan kasus uji (misalnya Decision Table, Boundary Value Analysis, dan sebagainya).
  3. Menguasai salah satu bahasa pemrograman dasar (misalnya Javascript, Typescript, Java, Python).
  4. Memiliki pengalaman dengan Framework Pengujian Otomatis (misalnya Jest, Playwright, WebdriverIO, Selenium, Robot, Cypress, Mocha).
  5. Memiliki pengalaman dengan konsep Seeding Data.
  6. Memiliki pengalaman dengan konsep API Testing.
  7. Memiliki keterampilan interpersonal yang baik, mampu bekerja dalam tim, serta memiliki empati terhadap pengguna akhir.
  8. Bersedia bekerja di kantor di Ampera, Jakarta Selatan.

title: Senior Product Manager (Pekanbaru/Medan)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Senior Product Manager (Pekanbaru/Medan)

Daftar Sekarang

Sumatra, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

•⁠  ⁠Own and drive product strategy, keep it aligned with product vision, and communicate it to stakeholders and users.

•⁠  ⁠Create roadmap, execute it, and ensuring the milestones are met in timely manner

•⁠  ⁠Discover user pain points through research and data grinding and collaborate with the analytics team to gain more insights.

•⁠  ⁠Prototype the product functionality and collaborate with the experience team for the best user experience.

•⁠  ⁠Maintain the product quality and collaborate with the quality team for the highest standard.

•⁠  ⁠Develop go-to-market strategy, drive execution, and collaborate with the growth team for the biggest impact releases.

•⁠  ⁠Analytical and data-driven, love digging into data and gathering insights. Able to define and measure success on every product build

•⁠  ⁠Experience working in a team with agile development environment

•⁠  ⁠Good communication skills in English

•⁠  ⁠Strong problem-solving

•⁠  ⁠Collaboration & Teamwork

•⁠  ⁠Able to work independently

Kualifikasi

•⁠ ⁠Bachelor’s degree, majoring in Computer Science, Information Technology, Mathematics, Business or other related fields with minimum GPA 3.00

•⁠ ⁠⁠5-6 years of experience in Product Management.

•⁠ ⁠⁠Expertise in Product Management Tools (e.g: Notion, GitHub Issues, Google Drive).

•⁠ ⁠⁠Expertise in Prototyping Tools (e.g: Figma).

•⁠ ⁠⁠Familiarity with Data Analytics Tools (e.g: Metabase, Google Analytics).

•⁠ ⁠⁠Familiarity with Software Testing Tools (e.g: Katalon)

•⁠ ⁠⁠Experience in Palm Oil related companies is preferred.

•⁠ ⁠Willing to relocate to Pekanbaru or Medan.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil Industry.

Our mission is to develop an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for People, Planet and Prosperity. Our Vision is to help palm oil smallholders become more PROficient in farming practices, so that they can produce more FFB crop, resulting in greater PROsperity for indigenous communities, also creating PROfitability for our business, PROtection of the natural environment and PROgress of Indonesia

SawitPRO is a game-changer, improving the smallholders’ living standard and helping our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil through efficient land use.

title: Product Software Quality (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Product Software Quality (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Create test plan and test case in detail, comprehensive and well structured.

Plan and Coordinate testing execution.

Create testing and bug fixing documentation.

Execute script testing and application testing.

Monitoring debugging process and bug fixing.

Doing investigation and provide solution on the issue and bug found during testing.

Tracking of the quality assurance metric e.g. open defect counts.

Experience working in a team with agile development environment.

Good communication skills in English.

Strong problem-solving.

Collaboration & Teamwork.

Able to work independently.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor’s degree, majoring in Computer Science, Information Technology or other related fields.

3-4 years of experience in software testing.

Experience in testing mobile, web, and API for both manual and automation.

Experience in Automation Testing Tools (e.g: Robotframework, Appium, Selenium).

Experience in Load Testing Tools (e.g: JMeter).

Experience in Penetration Testing Tools.

Experience in Behavior Driven Development & Tools (e.g: Cucumber with Gherkin).

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Financial Analyst (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Financial Analyst (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

The Financial Analyst plays a key role in driving company performance through accurate budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling. This position collaborates closely with cross-functional teams to gather data, analyze financial results, evaluate business initiatives, and provide insights that support strategic decision-making. The role also maintains financial models, dashboards, and reporting systems to ensure management has timely, reliable information for operational and strategic planning.

Develop annual budgets, long-term financial plans, and track performance against targets.

Prepare and enhance financial forecasts using historical data, market trends, and business inputs.

Conduct financial analyses to support strategic initiatives such as investments, mergers, and process improvements.

Monitor financial performance and KPIs to identify trends, risks, and improvement opportunities.

Generate regular and ad-hoc financial reports for management and stakeholders.

Maintain accurate financial models, databases, and dashboards for decision support.

Build scenario and sensitivity analyses to support forecasting and risk assessment.

Perform cost analysis to identify optimization opportunities and support finance automation initiatives.

Collaborate with multiple departments to gather information and validate financial data.

Present financial insights and recommendations clearly to senior management.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor's degree in finance, accounting, economics, or a related field from reputable university with minimum GPA 3.00.

Strong analytical and quantitative skills.

Proficiency in financial modelling and data analysis tools (e.g., Excel, financial planning software).

Excellent communication and presentation skills.

Attention to detail and accuracy.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Knowledge of financial principles, budgeting, and forecasting.

Willing to be placed in Pekanbaru area

Generate regular and ad-hoc financial reports for management and stakeholders.

Build scenario and sensitivity analyses to support forecasting and risk assessment.

Collaborate with multiple departments to gather information and validate financial data.

Present financial insights and recommendations clearly to senior management.

Excellent communication and presentation skills.

Attention to detail and accuracy.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Knowledge of financial principles, budgeting, and forecasting.

title: Procurement Fertilizer (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Procurement Fertilizer (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

The candidate’s responsibility will be to work closely with Head of Procurement, Head of Supply Chain, Sales & Finance team. You will be responsible for spearheading our procurement strategy, ensuring the acquisition of a diverse range of agricultural inputs at competitive prices (also including general procurement items required by the Company). Your expertise will be crucial in managing supplier relationships, negotiating contracts, and aligning our procurement efforts with the broader business objectives to support growth and operational efficiency.

You will be responsible to:

Develop, implement, and continuously refine a comprehensive procurement strategy that encompasses all categories of agricultural inputs.

Conduct extensive market research to identify reliable suppliers across different agri input categories, ensuring a diverse supplier base.

Lead the procurement process from supplier evaluation and selection to contract negotiation, ensuring adherence to quality, cost, and delivery standards.

Foster strong, strategic relationships with key suppliers to guarantee the best value in terms of price, quality, and service.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including finance, operations, and sales, to integrate procurement plans with business objectives.

Manage and optimize procurement budgets, focusing on cost-saving initiatives without compromising on product quality or availability.

Establish and maintain quality standards for all procured agri inputs, working closely with suppliers to ensure compliance.

Oversee logistics and supply chain management for all agri inputs, ensuring efficient and timely availability to meet customer demands.

Stay ahead of industry trends, market dynamics, and new technologies that can influence our product offerings and procurement strategies.

Kualifikasi

You will demonstrate the following requirements:

Bachelor's degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Agriculture, or related fields.

At least 7 years of proven experience in procurement, preferably within the agriculture or e-commerce sectors, with a focus on a wide range of agri inputs. Experience in Palm Oil Industry is a great advantage.

Exceptional negotiation skills and the capacity to foster long-term supplier relationships.

Strong analytical, strategic, and problem-solving abilities.

Comprehensive knowledge of the agri input market in Indonesia and globally.

Fluent in English and Bahasa Indonesia, both written and spoken.

Proficient in the use of procurement software and advanced analytics tools.

Demonstrated leadership and team management capabilities, with exceptional communication and presentation skills.

Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively across diverse teams.

Ability to work under tight deadlines and handle multiple tasks simultaneously

Willing to Travel across Indonesia, and

permanent based in Pekanbaru City

.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil industry. SawitPRO develops an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for people, planet and profit. Our missions are to improve the livelihood of Indonesia’s smallholders, to unlock value for the industry, and to strive in a demanding global market in traceability and sustainability of palm oil products.

We provide platforms that connect the supply chain stakeholders within the palm oil industry (i.e. Palm Oil Mills, Agents, Smallholders, and Agri Input vendors), create a digital ecosystem that removes friction points, and essentially boosts the productivity of the smallholders via access to affordable yet high quality agro-inputs, agronomic services, and high-quality planting materials.

We envision to be the game-changer that improves smallholders’ living standard, and helps our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Videographer & Youtube (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Videographer & Youtube (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Contract (Full WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Plan, shoot, and edit videos for YouTube, social media, internal communications, and digital campaigns.

Handle end-to-end video production including pre-production, scripting support, shooting, editing, and publishing.

Create YouTube content such as podcasts, interviews, educational videos, customer stories, company updates, live sessions, webinars, tutorials, and event coverage.

Manage YouTube channel performance including thumbnails, titles, descriptions, tags, playlists, end screens, cards, and SEO optimization.

Monitor YouTube analytics including views, CTR, watch time, audience retention, subscriber growth, and engagement.

Create short-form video content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, and Facebook.

Develop content ideas and video concepts that can improve reach, engagement, and watch hours.

Support live streaming activities for podcasts, webinars, product launches, company events, and special campaigns.

Ensure all videos are aligned with SawitPRO brand identity, tone, and communication guidelines.

Work closely with the marketing, social media, SEO, product, and sales teams to support campaign objectives.

Handle video asset organization, storage, and content library management.

Create and maintain SOPs for YouTube content production, editing style, thumbnail design, publishing schedule, and video quality standards.

Stay updated with YouTube trends, content formats, editing techniques, audio trends, and platform algorithm changes.

Assist in managing basic equipment such as camera, lighting, microphone, tripod, and studio setup.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor’s degree in Multimedia, Broadcasting, Film, Communication, Visual Design, or related field.

Minimum 2 years of experience in videography, video editing, content production, or YouTube management.

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, or other video editing software.

Familiar with Adobe After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Canva is a plus.

Strong understanding of YouTube SEO, YouTube analytics, and audience growth strategies.

Able to operate camera, lighting, microphone, and video production equipment.

Strong storytelling, editing, and visual communication skills.

Good understanding of content trends across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn.

Able to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple projects at once.

Detail-oriented, creative, proactive, and open to feedback.

Experience in podcast production, live streaming, or webinar setup is a plus.

Experience in agriculture, startup, technology, or B2B industry is preferred.

Willing to be placed in Pekanbaru, Riau.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Rental Productivity and Community Lead
raw_description:
Rental Productivity and Community Lead

Team

Operations

/

Marketing, Communications & Public Policy

Location

BSD, Tangerang, Indonesia

Job Type

Full-time

The role at a glance

Skills you need

What we offer

Life at Grab

The role at a glance

Get to Know the Team

We are Grab Rentals ID. We provide fleet supply and productive drivers to Grab, serving the non bank-able partner to work as Grab's driver-partner. In the Productivity and Community team, we identify opportunities to maintain and increasing dax productivity. We have around 4700 active drivers in "Sahabat Rental" and "Sahabat Rental EV" in JABODETABEK Area

Get to Know the Role

You will be the bridge between our organization, internal departments, and external partners. You will empower a diverse team through inclusive mentorship, and professional development. You will take a data-driven approach to track productivity, analyze performance trends, and design creative training or incentive programs. Collaborating with Operations and Marketing, you will align strategies across the business and keep management informed through clear reporting. Reporting to the Manager, you will be based onsite in our Cinangka Pool.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

Guide junior members from all backgrounds, promoting an inclusive environment that promotes learning and professional development.

Work with partners—including Operations, Marketing, Training, and Management—to align diverse perspectives and achieve shared team goals.

Monitor team and partner productivity against clear Indicators, ensuring goals are achievable, transparent, and fair.

Review performance trends to identify opportunities, addressing systemic challenges to help everyone do their best work.

Develop and launch supportive programs, training, and incentive structures designed to improve performance and motivate a diverse workforce.

Oversee the smooth execution of new programs from start to finish, ensuring they run and deliver meaningful outcomes.

Prepare transparent regular reports for management, outlining achievements, operational hurdles, and applicable recommendations.

Be an empathetic bridge between our organization and its community; listen to feedback, host engaging events (like webinars or meetups), and advocate for community needs internally.

Read more

Skills you need

What Essential Skills You Will Need

title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend
raw_description:
Senior Software Engineer, Backend

Team

Engineering

Location

Jakarta, Indonesia

Job Type

Full-time

The role at a glance

Skills you need

What we offer

Life at Grab

The role at a glance

Get to Know the Team:

The Lending team builds secure and versatile loan products for diverse user segments, owning critical platform components such as Credit Risk, User Profiles, Credit Limits and Offers, Lender Journeys, the Pricing Engine etc. We design and operate large-scale distributed systems that impact millions of users, with a strong focus on financial inclusion and underserved communities.

Get to Know the Role:

As a Senior Backend Developer, you will develop scalable software applications using GoLang. You will be at the forefront of our development efforts, leading architectural plans and coaching junior engineers. You will report to the Engineering Manager, Backend. This role is based in Jakarta.

The Critical Tasks You will Perform:

You will design and construct software applications using GoLang.

You will Identify key tasks, prioritise them, and deliver them throughout the software development life cycle.

You will automate tasks using appropriate tools and scripting.

You will collaborate with multiple teams to define needs, design new features and deliver them.

You will lead the architecture and coding standards efforts, ensuring clean and efficient code.

You will conduct code reviews to ensure adherence to coding standards, best practices, and security guidelines.

You will troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing software.

You will stay up-to-date with latest trends and technologies to improve our products and processes.

You will mentor junior software engineers, and guide their development.

Read more

Skills you need

What Essential Skills You will Need:

5+ years of related work experience in a similar capacity

title: Senior Systems Engineer (Mobile Device Management)
raw_description:
Senior Systems Engineer (Mobile Device Management)

Team

Technology Solutions

Location

Jakarta, Indonesia

Job Type

Full-time

The role at a glance

Skills you need

What we offer

Life at Grab

The role at a glance

Get to Know the Team

Grabber Technology Solutions (GTS) aims to be a technology leader that provides predictive and seamless experiences to all Grab employees (Grabbers). We are a diverse team of technology practitioners looking to outserve Grabbers with positive, personalised IT experiences. We are looking for individuals with similar customer-centric and innovative values to join our growing team.

Get to Know the Role

As the senior systems engineer, you will be responsible for endpoint and patch management in Grab to ensure smooth daily regional operations (Level 2 and 3) and management of tasks/projects for the business. You will need to have a background in mobile device management, patch management, operating system, and application lifecycle management. Additionally, they will need to have scripting skills. Furthermore, they must be able to collaborate excellently and communicate updates and resolutions to customers and other partners effectively.

You will report to the IT System Manager. This role is based onsite at Grab's office in South Jakarta, Indonesia.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

Endpoint Management Systems:

Responsible for endpoint management via Software as a Service (SaaS) - SaaS based systems like Jamf, Workspace One, Digicert and JumpCloud.

Responsible for software evaluation, testing, endpoint deployment and post-deployment support.

Responsible for OS patch management and application lifecycle management.

Document system configurations, procedures, and troubleshooting steps.

Automation & Optimisation:

Automate tasks to maintain operational efficiency on the platform we manage.

Team Collaboration:

Work with internal stakeholders, vendors, and cross-functional teams to provide technical expertise and support.

Provide Level 2 & 3 IT operational support. Coordinate and liaise with vendors for operational support.

Stay up-to-date with industry trends and latest technologies.

Troubleshoot complex technical issues across different managed systems and platforms to ensure minimal downtime and optimal performance.

title: Sr Officer-Supply Chain Excellence
raw_description:
Role Purpose

The Sr. Officer-Supply Chain Excellence will play a crucial role in supporting the efficiency and effectiveness of our end-to-end supply chain. This position is responsible for executing key tasks across demand planning, procurement, inventory control, and logistics. The incumbent will provide critical data analysis, manage inventory levels, process procurement orders, and coordinate transportation to ensure the smooth flow of goods, contributing directly to operational excellence and cost optimization.

 

Key Responsibilities

  1. Demand and Supply Planning Support: Collect, compile, and analyze data from various sources to support the development of accurate demand forecasts.
  2. Assist in identifying trends, patterns, and inconsistencies in demand and supply data to inform planning decisions.
  3. Inventory Management & Control: implement and maintain inventory control procedures to ensure optimal stock availability while minimizing costs.
  4. Monitor inventory levels and reorder points, conduct regular stock audits (cycle counts), and investigate and reconcile discrepancies.
  5. Analyze inventory data to identify potential issues such as slow-moving items or excess stock.
  6. Procurement & Sourcing Execution: Assist in processing purchase orders, from requisition and quote gathering to order placement and tracking.
  7. Maintain accurate procurement documentation and support the resolution of basic invoice discrepancies.
  8. Logistics, Warehousing & Transportation: Coordinate with carriers and vendors to schedule pickups and deliveries, ensuring timely movement of goods.
  9. Track shipments, manage transportation documentation (e.g., bills of lading), and resolve routine delivery issues.
  10. Support basic warehouse tasks and processes as needed to ensure efficient order fulfillment.
  11. Data Reporting & Analysis: Collect and report data on key supply chain metrics, including production, inventory, and transportation.
  12. Generate simple charts and reports to visualize data and support performance monitoring.
  13. Oversee end-to-end inventory disposal process (damaged, expired, obsolete), including physical segregation, valuation, approvals, and documentation.
  14. Ensure environmental and regulatory compliance for disposal, working with Legal, Procurement, and Compliance teams.
  15. Track and report disposal costs, impact on financial books, and recurring root causes.

 

Experience:

  • Minimum of 3-5 years of hands-on experience in a supply chain, logistics, or inventory management role.
  • Proven experience with inventory control procedures, including cycle counting and discrepancy analysis.
  • Demonstrable experience with procurement processes and transportation coordination.

 

Education:

Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Business Administration, Industrial Engineering, or a related field.

Job Responsibilities

Demand and Supply Planning
Inventory Management
Transportation and Logistics
Warehousing and Distribution

Skills

Data Analysis
Supply Chain Management
Transportation and Logistics Management
Inventory Management Software
Logistics Operations
Demand Forecasting
Operational Excellence
Stock Control

title: AVP-Product Sales Specialist - Ads & Analytics
raw_description:
Job Details

The role is responsible for leading the sales support function by enabling Sales teams with strong solutioning, commercial structuring, and product positioning. This role ensures enterprise opportunities are supported with the right technical and commercial solutions to improve deal conversion and accelerate revenue realization.

 

The role acts as the bridge between Product, Sales, Technology, and Partnerships to ensure seamless commercialization of the company’s product portfolio:

  • Collect & analyze data (pipeline & deals won/lost)
  • Provide insights; trends, opportunities & guidance to optimize products
  • Create monthly report to track growth & progress
  • Provide insights & recommendations to enhance/optimize the process.

Job Details

Minimum Requirements:

  • Minimum S1 degree from a reputable university, majoring in Business Management/Administration, Marketing Communication, or Information Technology.
  • At least 3 years of experience in sales or similar roles, preferably with exposure to government sector projects.
  • Strong knowledge of word processing, spreadsheet, database, and presentation software.
  • Proficient in CRM software.
  • Strong communication skills, with the ability to engage effectively with different industries and stakeholders.
  • Familiarity with telecommunications products and services.
  • Strong projection and forecasting skills to drive business growth.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively with cross-functional teams.

 

Area of Responsibilities:

Sales enablement

  • Lead solutioning support for enterprise opportunities across the product portfolio
  • Work with Sales teams to design tailored solutions aligned with customer needs
  • Support proposal development, RFP responses, and technical presentations
  • Develop sales toolkits including
  • Train sales teams on product capabilities and solution positioning

 

Commercial enablement

  • Provide guidance on pricing structures and commercial models for complex deals
  • Align product capabilities with client business requirements and revenue objectives
  • Support negotiations with enterprise clients

 

Pipeline management

  • Track pipeline performance and conversion metrics
  • Analyze deal performance to identify opportunities for improvement
  • Provide insights and recommendations to improve sales effectiveness

title: AVP-Technical Business Development Specialist (Cybersecurity)
raw_description:
Role Purpose

Own the Security-led growth engine within the Technical Business Development unit to deliver realized revenue for Indosat Business. This role acts as a Strategic Solution Lead and Commercial Architect, bridging the gap between complex Cybersecurity principles and scalable revenue. The AVP is responsible for translating complex security technology into business outcomes, shaping high-value opportunities early with BD and Sales, and ensuring the successful adoption of the security portfolio within the B2B segment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Incubate and shape high-value opportunities: Lead customer/opportunity discovery sessions to validate business outcomes, identify stakeholders, and build a clear value storyline before the formal proposal stage
  • Translate architecture into business value: Translate complex security principles (e.g., Cybersecurity, SOC, CTI, IAM, Network Security, and Cloud Security) into business-ready narratives that focus on ROI, TCO, and customer pain points.
  • Support Sales, Presales, and Product teams: Act as a opportunity shaper, help define solution direction, scope, and commercial approach early so opportunities are proposal-ready and deliverable.
  • Own security pipeline governance: Maintain high-integrity pipeline data (especially strategic pipelines), ensuring stage discipline, risk tracking, and accurate revenue forecasting for leadership.
  • Validate solution logic: Handle key technical objections at an architectural level to ensure the security solution is fit-for-purpose and aligns with the customer's strategic objectives

Job Summary

  • Revenue & Adoption Delivery: Deliver IOH Business revenue target by operationalizing Security-led opportunities into realized billing.
  • Opportunity Shaping: Incubate strategic deals early to improve win probability, validate solution direction, and shorten the sales cycle.
  • Governance & Reporting: Maintain high-integrity pipeline governance to drive prioritization and provide leadership with predictable forecasts.

 

Qualifications:

    • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or Business.
    • Background in Sales Specialist, Technical Sales, Cybersecurity Product, Security Presales, or Security Solution Architect roles with a strong cybersecurity knowledge, and adequate communication skill, commercial and revenue orientation.
    • Professional security certifications (e.g., CISSP, CISM, or vendor-specific certifications from Palo Alto, Fortinet, or Cisco) are highly regarded.
    • 7+ years of experience in the Cybersecurity and enterprise solutions ecosystem.
      • Proven experience in opportunity shaping and managing multi-stakeholder customer engagements.
      • Experience in translating customer painpoints into deliverable security roadmaps.

title: AVP-Devices
raw_description:
Reports to: EVP-Head of National Sales & Distribution

 

Job Summary:

Senior Device Partnership & Commercialization is responsible for driving device-led commercial growth by identifying, developing, and managing strategic partnerships with device manufacturers and distributors. The role focuses on increasing customer penetration in device ownership, including second-device adoption and replacement, by enabling compelling device propositions across sales channels. This role also covers development of IOH system compatibility to all devices used by our customer/consumers in the market. This role will make sure IOH winning proposition through devices used.

This role acts as a subject matter expert in the device ecosystem—combining deep understanding of device industry trends, product specifications, and customer needs to recommend the right device portfolio, pricing approach, and bundling strategies. The role is accountable for shaping device roadmaps, evaluating device capabilities and translating technical features into clear commercial value propositions that can be effectively sold in walking stores and other distribution channels.

The role works cross-functionally with commercial, sales, supply chain, and marketing teams to ensure seamless execution of device programs—from partnership alignment and device selection to logistics readiness and in-store availability. It also supports sales teams by defining how devices should be positioned and sold to maximize conversion and customer value.

Ultimately, this role plays a key part in unlocking incremental revenue through device bundling, strengthening partner ecosystems, and enhancing overall customer experience without direct team management responsibility.

 

Key Responsibilities:

  • Partnership Development & Management

Identify, evaluate, and establish strategic partnerships with device manufacturers, devices outlets and distributors. Negotiate commercial terms and align joint business plans. Strong and sustainable device partner ecosystem

Deliverables: # of active strategic partnerships; partnership revenue contribution (%); commercial deal margin / profitability

 

  • Device Portfolio Strategy & Roadmap

Define device portfolio (smartphones, routers, FWA devices, etc.) aligned with target segments and business strategy. Build short- and long-term device roadmap.

Deliverables: Device portfolio hit rate (sell-through %); time-to-market for new devices; portfolio contribution to total sales (%)

 

  • Commercialization & Bundling Strategy

Design device + service bundling strategies (e.g., FTTH, FWA, mobile bundles). Define pricing, subsidy, and promotion schemes.

Deliverables: Device attach rate (%); bundle penetration (%); incremental revenue from bundles

 

  • Device Capability & Value Proposition

Analyze device specifications and translate them into clear, customer-centric selling points. Ensure alignment with network/service advantages. Strong and differentiated value proposition

Deliverables: Conversion rate in stores (%); sales effectiveness (device sell-out per store); customer uptake of targeted devices

 

  • Channel Enablement & Sales Support

Equip sales channels (walking stores, frontline teams) with the right positioning, training materials, and selling guidelines. Improved frontline sales capability and execution

Deliverables: Sales productivity per store; mystery shopping/sales quality score; training effectiveness score

 

  • Supply Chain & Logistics Alignment

Collaborate with supply chain teams to ensure device availability, demand planning, and distribution readiness.

Deliverables: Stock availability rate (%); inventory turnover days; stock-out/overstock incidents

 

  • Cross-functional Program Execution

Coordinate across commercial, marketing, sales, and operations teams to execute device programs end-to-end. Seamless and timely execution of device initiatives

Deliverables: On-time program launch (%); execution quality score; cross-function project SLA adherence

 

  • Performance Tracking & Optimization

Monitor device sales performance, customer behavior, and market trends. Continuously refine strategy and partnerships. Continuous performance improvement and growth

Deliverables: Device GMV / revenue growth (%); sell-through vs forecast accuracy; ROI of device programs

 

Job Qualification:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Telecommunications, or related field MBA or Master’s degree is an advantage
  • Experience 7-10+ years of relevant experience
  • Proven track record in device industry, telco, or consumer electronics commercial roles
  • Experience in device partnership management, portfolio strategy, and go-to-market execution
  • Hands-on exposure to device lifecycle management (selection, pricing, launch, sell-out)
  • Experience in bundling devices with services and working with cross-functional teams

 

Technical Skills:

  • Strong understanding of device ecosystem, specifications, and technology trends
  • Expertise in commercial strategy, pricing, and bundling models
  • Ability to translate technical device features into customer value propositions
  • Strong data analysis and performance tracking capability
  • Good understanding of sales channels and basic supply chain/logistics for devices

Deliverables: Device portfolio hit rate (sell-through %); time-to-market for new devices; portfolio contribution to total sales (%)

 

  • Commercialization & Bundling Strategy

Design device + service bundling strategies (e.g., FTTH, FWA, mobile bundles). Define pricing, subsidy, and promotion schemes.

Deliverables: Device attach rate (%); bundle penetration (%); incremental revenue from bundles

 

  • Device Capability & Value Proposition

Analyze device specifications and translate them into clear, customer-centric selling points. Ensure alignment with network/service advantages. Strong and differentiated value proposition

Deliverables: Conversion rate in stores (%); sales effectiveness (device sell-out per store); customer uptake of targeted devices

 

  • Channel Enablement & Sales Support

Equip sales channels (walking stores, frontline teams) with the right positioning, training materials, and selling guidelines. Improved frontline sales capability and execution

Deliverables: Sales productivity per store; mystery shopping/sales quality score; training effectiveness score

 

  • Supply Chain & Logistics Alignment

Collaborate with supply chain teams to ensure device availability, demand planning, and distribution readiness.

Deliverables: Stock availability rate (%); inventory turnover days; stock-out/overstock incidents

 

  • Cross-functional Program Execution

Coordinate across commercial, marketing, sales, and operations teams to execute device programs end-to-end. Seamless and timely execution of device initiatives

Deliverables: On-time program launch (%); execution quality score; cross-function project SLA adherence

 

  • Performance Tracking & Optimization

Monitor device sales performance, customer behavior, and market trends. Continuously refine strategy and partnerships. Continuous performance improvement and growth

Deliverables: Device GMV / revenue growth (%); sell-through vs forecast accuracy; ROI of device programs

 

Job Qualification:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, Telecommunications, or related field MBA or Master’s degree is an advantage
  • Experience 7-10+ years of relevant experience
  • Proven track record in device industry, telco, or consumer electronics commercial roles
  • Experience in device partnership management, portfolio strategy, and go-to-market execution
  • Hands-on exposure to device lifecycle management (selection, pricing, launch, sell-out)
  • Experience in bundling devices with services and working with cross-functional teams

 

Technical Skills:

  • Strong understanding of device ecosystem, specifications, and technology trends
  • Expertise in commercial strategy, pricing, and bundling models
  • Ability to translate technical device features into customer value propositions
  • Strong data analysis and performance tracking capability
  • Good understanding of sales channels and basic supply chain/logistics for devices

title: Officer-National Salesforce Management
raw_description:
Job Details

Role Purpose:

Capability Building focuses on enhancing employees' abilities, while Reward Management ensures that those enhanced abilities are recognized and compensated. Both are integral in creating a high-performance culture where employees are continually developing and feel motivated by both monetary and non-monetary rewards.

This role specifically requires a deep understanding of field sales operations at Indosat Ooredoo Hutchison (IOH), enabling the postholder to bridge the gap between on-ground realities and system/capability solutions that support the sales team.

 

Key Responsibilities:

 

Sales System Analysis & Improvement

  • Conduct in-depth analysis of existing systems used by the sales team in the field (e.g. retailer apps, sales force tools, reporting platforms)
  • Identify system gaps, pain points, and inefficiencies based on field experience and direct engagement with sales team users
  • Translate field findings into structured system improvement proposals and feature requirements
  • Collaborate with Digital/IT and system solution partners to prioritize and implement enhancements
  • Monitor adoption and effectiveness of system updates post-implementation

Sales Capability Building (L&D)

  • Design and develop training modules covering both system usage and sales competencies
  • Build Train the Trainer programs to cascade capability at scale across field teams
  • Develop Corporate Competencies through New Leadership Competency frameworks
  • Align L&D programs with actual field sales challenges and system workflows

Reward Management

  • Design programs that motivate the sales team to achieve highest potential
  • Develop a comprehensive reward system that attracts, motivates, and retains top talent
  • Leverage system data to ensure reward programs are tied to measurable field performance

 

Qualification:

  • Bachelor's degree in Telecommunications, Computer Science, Information Systems, or Programming
  • Analytical thinking and understanding of telco business & digitalization principles
  • Willing to work hard and collaborate effectively as a team
  • Target & result oriented, with good teamwork and passion for data discoveries
  • Self-driven and high achiever mentality to drive high-performing teams
  • Adaptability: able to handle current situations and adjust to new challenges
  • Learning Mindset: agile in adopting new methods & technology for improvement

 

Related Experience:

  • Minimum 2 years of direct Sales experience at IOH (field sales, channel sales, or distribution sales)
  • 2 years of experience in capability building and developing people
  • Experience in building programs, training/module materials derived from stakeholder requirements and business needs
  • Experience in system development and partnership management

 

Skills

  • Analytical and problem-solving skills related to retailer apps
  • Ability to design retailer app architecture and plan future development
  • Translate stakeholder requirements into system solutions
  • Understanding of IOH sales tools and systems used in field operations
  • AI operating skill to support daily working

title: AVP-Product & Customer Insight
raw_description:
Job Description

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead the management of tracking studies to monitor brand health and key business category performance, ensuring methodologies remain aligned with evolving market dynamics.
  • Manage continuous research programs across strategic segments to comprehensively monitor product usage patterns, customer behavior and satisfaction levels.
  • Serve as a strategic partner for external research agencies, overseeing the end-to-end process from research design framework to output validation to ensure high-impact deliverables.
  • Design and direct ad-hoc studies to provide data-driven solutions for business challenges and long-term strategic initiatives.
  • Establish and drive agile internal quantitative research capabilities to generate rapid insights that support swift and informed decision-making.
  • Synthesize various primary and secondary data sources into comprehensive, accurate analyses that are highly relevant to business requirements.
  • Translate complex data into compelling business narratives that are simple, engaging, and actionable for stakeholders.

 

Required Skills

Hard Skills

  1. Advanced Research Methodology, deep expertise in various market research techniques (Quantitative & Qualitative), including Usage & Attitude (U&A), Pricing Studies, Brand Funnel Analysis, and Concept Testing.
  1. Agency Management, proven ability to manage vendor relationships, and audit data quality from research agencies.
  2. Analytical Tools, proficiency in data analysis software (e.g., SPSS, Advanced Excel) and data visualization platforms (Tableau, Power BI).
  3. Data Synthesis, the ability to merge internal behavioral data (CRM/Usage) with market research findings to produce 360-degree customer analysis.
  4. Product Knowledge, a strong understanding of product lifecycles and the telecommunications/digital industry landscape.

 

Soft Skills

  1. Strategic Business Storytelling, the ability to transform technical data and figures into strategic narratives.
  1. Strategic Influence, capable of building trust and influencing management-level decision-making through evidence-based insights.
  2. Agility & Problem Solving, high adaptability to rapidly changing business priorities and the ability to provide efficient research solutions.
  3. Attention to Detail, high precision in validating data integrity before it is used as a benchmark for business decisions.

 

Experience & Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Marketing, Telecommunication or Social Sciences with a strong analytical focus.
  • A minimum of 5 - 8 years of experience in Market Research or Customer Insight, with at least 3 - 5 years in a managerial role.
  • A proven track record of managing research projects and reputable global research agencies.

title: AVP-Security Product Manager Lead
raw_description:
Company & Role Overview

Company Overview:

We are a leading technology company seeking a talented and driven individual to join our innovative team. Our mission is to deliver cutting-edge solutions that redefine industry standards and drive digital transformation. We foster a collaborative and dynamic work environment where creativity and strategic thinking are highly valued.

Purpose of the Job:

This role is responsible for the complete lifecycle management of designated products, ensuring alignment with the organization's strategic goals. The main purpose of this position is to drive product success through market analysis, innovation, and effective cross-functional collaboration. Key areas of focus include identifying market opportunities, defining product features and functionalities, and overseeing the product development process. Furthermore, this role involves creating product documentation and providing essential support to sales and marketing teams. Ultimately, the Product Manager leverages market feedback to continuously evaluate and refine product direction, ensuring optimal performance and market relevance.

Key Responsibilities

  • Product Vision & Strategy: Own and execute the strategic product roadmap for the enterprise cybersecurity portfolio, ensuring full alignment with the Security Product Factory's revenue targets and commercial objectives.

  • Go-to-Market (GTM) & Commercialization: Formulate and execute comprehensive GTM strategies—including pricing, commercial packaging, value positioning, and sales enablement—across direct enterprise channels and strategic partner networks.

  • Strategic Alliance & Partner Management: Collaborate closely with strategic joint-venture partners, global technology vendors, and external consultants to co-develop, launch, and scale co-branded security services.

  • Requirements & Lifecycle Management: Translate market needs and threat landscapes into concrete product requirements. Manage the full product lifecycle from conceptualization and business case formulation to development, launch, optimization, and eventual phase-out.

  • Sales Enablement & Presales Support: Drive cross-functional collaboration with B2B Sales, Presales, and Marketing teams, delivering training, collateral, and technical-commercial tools to accelerate pipeline conversion.

  • Performance Monitoring & Intelligence: Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs), product margins, and customer adoption metrics. Use data-driven insights to steer iterative feature enhancements and identify portfolio expansion opportunities.

Required Skills & Qualifications

Required Skills & Qualifications

Education

  • Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Cybersecurity, Business Administration, or a related technical/business field.

  • Preferred: MBA or Master’s degree with a focus on Product Management, Technology Management, or Cybersecurity.

Experience

  • Core Experience: Minimum of 5–7 years of B2B Product Management experience, specifically within the cybersecurity, cloud services, or telecommunications sector.

  • Portfolio Management: Proven track record of managing complex enterprise security solutions (e.g., threat intelligence, endpoint protection, web security, cloud security, or managed detection and response).

  • GTM Track Record: Demonstrated success in developing, launching, and commercializing security products that have directly driven measurable B2B revenue growth.

  • Ecosystem Experience: Solid experience working in multi-partner GTM environments, channel-based sales models, or collaborative ventures.

  • Stakeholder Leadership: Expert at guiding cross-functional, multi-layered teams (including software engineers, security researchers, marketing, and enterprise sales forces) without direct authority.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Deep familiarity with the Indonesian enterprise/B2B security landscape and regulatory compliance environments (e.g., Kominfo, PDP law, ISO 27001).

  • Industry certifications such as CISSP, CISM, CISA, or formal product management certifications (e.g., Pragmatic Institute, NPDP).

Core Competency Map

Proficiency Level Core Competency Domain Focus Areas
Expert Product & GTM Strategy Strategic roadmap design, enterprise pricing models, GTM planning, and value proposition tailoring.
  Partnership & Alliance Management Coordinating commercial and technical integrations with major tech partners and joint ventures.
  Stakeholder Orchestration Bridging engineering, sales, marketing, and executive leadership.
Advanced Technical Portfolio Definition Translating threat intelligence, cloud, and web security concepts into viable enterprise products.
  Sales Enablement & Marketing Developing high-impact training, client-facing collateral, and pre-sales positioning tools.
Intermediate Data-Driven Analysis Product performance metrics, margin analysis, and market trend tracking.
  Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) Navigating initial feasibility phases to structured launch execution.
Basic Product & Security Testing Supervising technical proof-of-concept (PoC) frameworks and functional validations.

title: Jindi South Jambi B - Mechanical & Rotating Engineer
raw_description:
• Perform and review the engineering design for mechanical, piping, and pipeline facilities.
  • Develop, review, and approve technical drawings and documents, including PFDs, P&IDs, Equipment Data Sheets, and Plant Layouts.
  • Review and optimize facility capacities, production rates, and material selection to ensure operational integrity.
  • Monitor, review, and oversee Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) activities to ensure compliance with project specifications, timeline, and budget.
  • Prepare, propose, and review Material Requisitions (MR) and Services Requisitions (SR) for technical alignment.
  • Generate, review, and manage comprehensive project CAPEX (Capital Expenditure) and OPEX (Operating Expenditure) estimations.
  • Propose, present, and defend programs and budget proposals to SKK Migas to secure necessary regulatory approvals.
raw_requirements:
• Bachelor or Master Degree in mechanical engineering from a reputable university.
  • Minimum 8 years of relevant experience in the oil and gas industry, specifically in facilities engineering and project management.
  • Strong expertise in Facilities Engineering and Mechanical Analysis.
  • In-depth knowledge of safety studies, including HAZOP, HAZID, and Plant Layout reviews.
  • Deep familiarity with international and local mechanical codes and standards (e.g., ASME, API, ANSI).
  • Solid understanding of project life cycles, including PIS (Project Initiation/Implementation Status) and project Close-out processes.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office, AutoCAD, and relevant Mechanical Software (e.g., Caesar II, PV Elite, HYSYS, or Pipenet).
  • Excellent communication, reporting, and presentation skills (ability to present technical and budget proposals clearly to management and regulatory bodies).
  • Strong leadership and managerial skills to coordinate project activities and supervise contractors.
  • Proficient in English (both written and spoken).
  • Fluency in Mandarin is a strong advantage.

title: GOKPL - Operation Production Engineer
raw_description:
• Lead and motivate the production team to achieve operational objectives.
  • Monitoring and controlling all hydrocarbon production and utility systems as well as ensuring that production targets are achieved.

  • Minimum 12 years of experience as an Operations/Production Engineer in onshore Oil & Gas facilities.
  • Proven experience in Operation Readiness Assurance (ORA).
  • Experienced in gas plant commissioning and start-up activities.
  • Strong understanding a of hydrocarbon production operations, utility systems, and plant operations.
  • Familiar with Permit to Work (PTW), Management of Change (MOC), and API standards.

title: Wards Nurse - HRT
organization_name: PT Jakarta Pakar Kardia (Heartology Cardiovascular Hospital)
raw_description:
1. Memberikan asuhan keperawatan secara komprehensif kepada pasien rawat inap sesuai standar profesi, standar pelayanan rumah sakit, dan prinsip keselamatan pasien
  2. Melakukan pengkajian, pemantauan, dan evaluasi kondisi pasien secara berkala, termasuk tanda-tanda vital, kondisi kardiovaskular, serta respons terhadap terapi yang diberikan serta melaporkan kepada Dokter yang bertugas
  3. Melakukan tindakan keperawatan dan pemberian obat sesuai instruksi dokter sesuai prinsip keselamatan pasien
  4. Membantu dokter dalam pemeriksaan, tindakan medis, dan prosedur diagnostik yang diperlukan
  5. Mengoperasikan dan memantau penggunaan alat kesehatan yang digunakan dalam perawatan pasien, termasuk alat monitoring jantung dan peralatan medis lainnya
  6. Memberikan edukasi kepada pasien dan keluarga mengenai kondisi kesehatan, pengobatan, perawatan lanjutan, pola hidup sehat, serta persiapan pulang (discharge planning)
  7. Melakukan dokumentasi asuhan keperawatan secara lengkap, akurat, dan tepat waktu pada rekam medis maupun Sistem Informasi Manajemen Rumah Sakit (SIMRS)
  8. Berkolaborasi dengan dokter, apoteker, ahli gizi, dan tenaga kesehatan lainnya untuk memastikan pelayanan pasien berjalan optimal
  9. Menjaga kenyamanan, keamanan, privasi, dan kerahasiaan informasi pasien selama menjalani perawatan di rumah sakit
  10. Memastikan kesiapan sarana, prasarana, serta ketersediaan alat dan bahan medis yang diperlukan untuk pelayanan pasien di unit rawat inap.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan Wajib Profesi Ners
  2. Memiliki STR Aktif
  3. Memiliki Pengetahuan lebih perawatan maupun obat-obatan pasien kardiovaskuler
  4. Memiliki pengalaman kerja sebagai perawat rawat inap pasien jantung dan pembuluh darah lebih diutamakan minimal 2 tahun
  5. Mampu bekerja secara sistem shift dan full time
  6. Mampu melakukan pemasangan infus
  7. Teliti, disiplin, bertanggung jawab, serta mampu bekerja secara individu maupun dalam tim.

title: DE Naval - PMP
raw_description:
1. Menyusun dan mengembangkan detail engineering design kapal berdasarkan basic design dan spesifikasi proyek.

2. Membuat dan mereview gambar teknik terkait struktur kapal, general arrangement, dan sistem kapal.

3. Menyiapkan gambar produksi (production drawing) yang dibutuhkan oleh tim produksi.

4. Melakukan perhitungan teknis terkait stabilitas kapal, strength structure, dan hydrostatics sesuai standar yang berlaku.

5. Memastikan desain dan gambar teknik sesuai dengan regulasi klasifikasi kapal (classification society) dan standar internasional.

6. Berkoordinasi dengan tim engineering lain (piping, electrical, mechanical, outfitting) untuk memastikan integrasi desain berjalan baik.

7. Memberikan dukungan teknis kepada tim produksi selama proses pembangunan kapal.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan Minimal S1 Teknik Perkapalan / Naval Architecture

2. Pengalaman Minimal 1-2 tahun pengalaman di bidang Naval Engineering / Ship Design

3. Fresh graduate dipertimbangkan (untuk level junior) dengan pengalaman project atau magang di shipyard/design office

4. Diutamakan memiliki pengalaman di industri shipyard atau marine engineering.

5. Kompetensi Teknis:

  • Memahami prinsip desain kapal (Naval Architecture)
  • Memahami struktur kapal dan konstruksi kapal
  • Memahami hydrostatics, stability, dan basic ship performance
  • Mampu membaca dan membuat gambar teknik kapal
  • Menguasai software desain teknik seperti: AutoCAD dan Rhino / ShipConstructor / AVEVA Marine / NAPA (nilai tambah)
  • Memahami standar klasifikasi kapal (ABS, LR, DNV, BKI, dll)
  • Memahami proses shipbuilding dan production drawing
  • Mampu melakukan analisa teknis dan problem solving engineering

title: Plant Maintenance Staff - FTI
raw_description:
Tanggung Jawab:

  1. Melaksanakan kegiatan preventive maintenance dan corrective maintenance terhadap mesin produksi, peralatan, serta fasilitas pendukung operasional.
  2. Melakukan inspeksi rutin untuk memastikan kondisi mesin dan peralatan dalam keadaan baik dan siap digunakan.
  3. Mengidentifikasi, menganalisis, dan melakukan perbaikan terhadap kerusakan mesin maupun peralatan operasional.
  4. Melakukan troubleshooting dan memberikan solusi atas permasalahan teknis yang terjadi di area produksi.
  5. Memastikan seluruh kegiatan perawatan dan perbaikan terdokumentasi dengan baik sesuai prosedur yang berlaku.
  6. Mencatat secara akurat aktivitas pemeliharaan, perbaikan, inspeksi, dan penggunaan suku cadang.
  7. Berkoordinasi dengan tim produksi untuk meminimalkan downtime dan memastikan kelancaran operasional.
  8. Melakukan pemantauan terhadap utilitas pabrik seperti listrik, kompresor, pompa, HVAC, genset, dan sistem pendukung lainnya.
  9. Mengusulkan kebutuhan suku cadang (spare parts) serta melakukan monitoring ketersediaannya.
  10. Memastikan seluruh pekerjaan maintenance dilakukan sesuai standar keselamatan kerja (K3) dan peraturan perusahaan.
  11. Berpartisipasi dalam kegiatan perbaikan berkelanjutan (continuous improvement) untuk meningkatkan efisiensi dan keandalan mesin.
  12. Membantu pelaksanaan instalasi, modifikasi, maupun commissioning mesin dan peralatan baru.
raw_requirements:
Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 Teknik Mesin, Teknik Elektro, Teknik Mekatronika, Teknik Industri, atau bidang terkait.
  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1 tahun di bidang Plant Maintenance, Engineering Maintenance, atau Maintenance Technician. Lulusan baru dipersilakan untuk melamar.
  • Memiliki pengalaman di lingkungan manufaktur menjadi nilai tambah. Bersedia bekerja dalam sistem shift apabila diperlukan.


Kompetensi Teknis:

  • Memahami konsep preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, dan predictive maintenance.
  • Memiliki kemampuan troubleshooting mesin dan peralatan produksi.
  • Memahami sistem mekanikal, elektrikal, pneumatik, dan hidrolik.
  • Mampu membaca gambar teknik, wiring diagram, atau schematic drawing.
  • Memahami penggunaan alat ukur dan alat kerja maintenance.
  • Memiliki pengetahuan terkait utilitas pabrik seperti:
    • Sistem kelistrikan
    • Air compressor
  • Familiar dengan sistem CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management System) atau ERP Maintenance menjadi nilai tambah.

title: DE Carpenter Engineer - PMP
raw_description:
1. Menyusun dan mengembangkan detail engineering design untuk pekerjaan carpentry/interior kapal berdasarkan basic design dan spesifikasi proyek.
  2. Membuat dan mereview gambar detail interior kapal seperti cabin arrangement, furniture layout, ceiling, flooring, wall panel, dan perlengkapan interior lainnya.
  3. Menyiapkan production drawing dan installation drawing untuk kebutuhan fabrikasi dan instalasi interior kapal.
  4. Menentukan spesifikasi material carpentry seperti marine plywood, panel, insulation, flooring material, dan furniture kapal.
  5. Memastikan desain interior kapal memenuhi standar keselamatan, kenyamanan, serta regulasi klasifikasi kapal.
  6. Berkoordinasi dengan tim engineering lain seperti outfitting, piping, electrical, dan HVAC untuk memastikan integrasi desain berjalan baik.
  7. Memberikan dukungan teknis kepada tim produksi selama proses fabrikasi dan instalasi carpentry di kapal.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan Minimal S1 Teknik Perkapalan, Teknik Mesin, Teknik Desain Interior, atau jurusan relevan.
  2. Pengalaman Minimal 1-2 tahun pengalaman di bidang carpentry engineering / ship interior design / outfitting engineering
  3. Fresh graduate dipertimbangkan untuk level junior dengan pengalaman magang atau project desain
  4. Diutamakan memiliki pengalaman di shipyard atau marine interior project.
  5. Kompetensi Teknis
    - Memahami desain interior kapal dan sistem akomodasi kapal
    - Memahami material carpentry untuk marine environment
    - Mampu membaca dan membuat gambar teknik interior dan carpentry
    - Menguasai software desain seperti: AutoCAD dan SketchUp / Rhino / 3D modelling software (nilai tambah)
    - Memahami layout furniture dan cabin arrangement
    - Memahami standar fire safety dan material requirement untuk interior kapal
    - Memahami proses fabrikasi dan instalasi interior kapal

title: Otopprentice Engineering / Intern - AOP
raw_description:
Product Development Intern (Mechanical - Jakarta Utara)

  1. Melakukan uji coba pemasangan (fitting test) untuk produk otomotif.
  2. Melengkapi dan mengelola deskripsi serta dokumentasi produk perdagangan (trading products).
  3. Mendukung tugas-tugas administratif yang berkaitan dengan aktivitas pengembangan produk.


Assembly Engineer Intern (Mechanical - Jakarta Utara)

  1. Mendukung penjadwalan pemulihan (recovery) dan proses uji coba untuk mesin press fit baru.
  2. Membantu uji coba pengaturan parameter mesin untuk keperluan relokasi pabrik ke Karawang.
  3. Mendukung proses instalasi, uji coba, dan pengaturan parameter pada mesin baru.
  4. Menyusun laporan perkembangan (progress report) dan mendukung pengembangan lini perakitan (assembling line) baru.


Friction Engineer Intern (Mechanical - Karawang)

  1. Mendukung aktivitas pemulihan (recovery) dan perbaikan (troubleshooting) pada mesin bull brake.
  2. Membantu uji coba pengaturan parameter mesin untuk keperluan relokasi pabrik ke Karawang.
  3. Mendukung proses instalasi, uji coba, dan pengaturan parameter pada mesin baru.
  4. Menyusun laporan perkembangan (progress report) terkait aktivitas relokasi pabrik ke Karawang.


Process Design Engineer Intern (Industrial - Purwakarta)

  1. Merancang proses produksi dari awal hingga akhir (end-to-end).
  2. Menyesuaikan alur perakitan (assembly flow) untuk pengisi daya kendaraan listrik (EV charger).
  3. Merancang stasiun kerja manufaktur (manufacturing workstation).
  4. Mengelola tenaga kerja (manpower) dan waktu siklus produksi (cycle time).


Production Capacity Planning Intern (Industrial - Purwakarta)

  1. Mengelola kapasitas lini produksi sesuai dengan permintaan pasar.
  2. Melakukan analisis hambatan (bottleneck), pemantauan OEE, dan utilisasi mesin.
  3. Membuat perkiraan (forecasting) kebutuhan mesin baru.


Purchasing Intern (Jakarta Utara)

  1. Menarik data permintaan dari tim marketing dan memperbarui portal berdasarkan status PO yang telah rilis.
  2. Memantau dan melacak progres persetujuan BAST PNT dari FPV pada portal PNT.
  3. Membuat rekapitulasi data item barang habis pakai (consumable) di gudang Cibitung.
  4. Memperbarui formulir pelacakan dan rekapitulasi untuk barang promosi.
  5. Membuat draf PR (Purchase Request) dan penyelesaian (settlement) pada portal permintaan pembayaran.
  6. Mencari (sourcing) vendor untuk barang promosi, merchandise, dan perdagangan umum (general trading).
  7. Menarik data dan melakukan tindak lanjut (follow-up) terkait PP outstanding kepada buyer serta PO outstanding kepada vendor.
raw_requirements:
Latar Belakang Teknik Mesin (Mechanical Engineering):

  1. Mahasiswa AKTIF, minimal tahun kedua atau ketiga
  2. Bersedia menjalani magang secara langsung di lokasi (onsite).
  3. Memiliki pengetahuan dasar di bidang manufaktur, desain, serta perangkat lunak desain 3D (contoh: Solidworks)
  4. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan analisis berbasis data (data-driven) yang baik.
  5. Mampu mengoperasikan fungsi-fungsi dasar Excel


Latar Belakang Teknik Industri (Industrial Engineering):

  1. Mahasiswa AKTIF, minimal tahun kedua atau ketiga
  2. Bersedia menjalani magang secara langsung di lokasi (onsite).
  3. Akrab/familiar dengan manajemen manufaktur & produksi.
  4. Cekatan dalam kerja sama tim berbasis data serta memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik.
  5. Mampu mengoperasikan fungsi-fungsi dasar Excel.

title: Business Development Analyst
raw_description:

  • Mengumpulkan, mendokumentasikan, dan mengupdate berbagai informasi terkait kondisi pasar (mikro/makro) termasuk trend kedepan yang akan terjadi secara global.
  • Menganalisis knowledge management database dan mengumpulkan informasi peluang proyek.
  • Mengumpulkan data primer/sekunder terkait proyek yang akan diapproach oleh perusahaan serta membuat base assumption.
  • Mengikuti kegiatan tender akuisisi yang diselenggarakan oleh stakeholders terkait serta menindaklanjuti hasil analisis preliminary due diligence bersama

  • Memiliki kemampuan analytical thinking, communication, teamwork & networking yang baik.

title: PPC Officer - UTPE
raw_description:
• Melakukan analisis dan merancang rencana produksi harian, mingguan, dan bulanan berdasarkan permintaan customer, kapasitas produksi, dan biaya yang dibutuhkan
  • Memantau proses pembelian material dan produksi di lapangan untuk memastikan kesesuaian dengan jadwal dan standar mutu
  • Memverifikasi dan mengontrol biaya kebutuhan material dan biaya produksi
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal D3 Teknik Industri atau Manajemen
  • IPK minimal 3.00
  • Memiliki pemahaman dasar mengenai production planning, scheduling, dan inventory control menjadi nilai tambah
  • Mampu mengolah dan menganalisis data dengan baik
  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan koordinasi yang baik
  • Bersedia ditempatkan di seluruh area operasional perusahaan (Balikpapan dan Jakarta)

title: Technical Support Junior Associate - UTPE
raw_description:
• Menyusun, update, dan memastikan akurasi product manual (part book & OMM), termasuk pembuatan dan standardisasi part number.
  • Melakukan create, update, dan assignment proses pada BOM serta memastikan sinkronisasi data lintas departemen melalui reporting bersama.
  • Membuat, menginput, dan mengelola material master di SAP (termasuk berbagai parameter seperti MRP, WM, costing), serta update laporan harian.
  • Menangani blocking/unblocking material, pengelolaan kamus part number, serta problem solving terkait duplikasi atau error data.
  • Membuat production version berdasarkan routing, serta mendukung koordinasi lintas fungsi (engineering, warehouse, IT, dll).
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal D3 Teknik Mesin (atau jurusan terkait)
  • Mampu mengelola material master, BOM, dan data produksi dalam sistem SAP
  • Terampil dalam pengolahan, updating, dan reporting data (termasuk Google Sheets)
  • Menguasai standard drawing, komponen, serta sistem part number
  • Mampu menangani isu seperti duplikasi data, error sistem, dan menjaga akurasi data
  • Proaktif, drive tinggi, serta mampu berpikir end-to-end (memahami impact ke proses berikutnya)

title: Quality Control Staff - PMP
raw_description:
1. Mengelola dan mengoordinasikan proses inspeksi untuk memastikan kesesuaian dengan standar kualitas yang ditetapkan. 
  2. Menyiapkan dan mengontrol seluruh dokumen mandatory terkait kebutuhan Class dan Owner. 
  3. Menyusun dan menyiapkan checksheet serta Request for Inspection (RFI) untuk kegiatan inspeksi. 
  4. Memelihara dan memonitor laporan temuan/masalah kualitas serta tindak lanjut perbaikannya. 
  5. Menyusun dan mengimplementasikan standar proses (quality standard/sigma process) guna meningkatkan konsistensi mutu. 
  6. Melaksanakan quality review secara berkala untuk memastikan efektivitas sistem pengendalian mutu
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan minimal S1 jurusan Naval Architecture/Marine Engineering, Industrial Engineering, atau bidang terkait. 
  2. Memahami standar industri perkapalan serta Rules & Regulations yang berlaku. 
  3. Diutamakan memiliki pengalaman minimal 1 tahun di bidang Quality Control atau industri galangan kapal. 
  4. Memiliki pemahaman terhadap proses pembangunan kapal dari awal hingga delivery menjadi nilai tambah. 
  5. Teliti, detail oriented, dan memiliki kemampuan analisis yang baik.

title: Safety Officer - PMP
raw_description:
1. Melakukan pengawasan keselamatan kerja di area galangan kapal dan ship repair, memastikan seluruh aktivitas perbaikan kapal berjalan sesuai prosedur K3, regulasi maritim, serta standar perusahaan. 
  2. Melaksanakan Safety Induction khusus shipyard bagi karyawan baru, kontraktor, subkontraktor, dan visitor terkait potensi bahaya seperti hot work, confined space, lifting operation, serta pekerjaan di atas kapal. 
  3. Mengawasi pelaksanaan pekerjaan berisiko tinggi, termasuk:
    a. Hot Work (welding, cutting, grinding)
    b. Confined Space Entry (tangki, ballast, ruang mesin)
    c. Working at Height
    d. Lifting & Rigging Operation
    e. Blasting & Painting Activities 
  4. Melakukan inspeksi rutin terhadap peralatan kerja dan safety equipment seperti crane, sling, shackle, scaffolding, gas detector, fire extinguisher, serta memastikan sertifikasi dan kelayakan alat. 
  5. Mengelola sistem Permit to Work (PTW) untuk aktivitas kritikal, termasuk hot work permit, confined space permit, dan lifting permit. 
  6. Melaksanakan safety patrol dan hazard identification di area dock, workshop, dan onboard vessel, serta memastikan corrective action diterapkan untuk mencegah kecelakaan kerja. 
  7. Memastikan penggunaan APD standar shipyard seperti safety harness, respirator, welding shield, life jacket, dan PPE lainnya sesuai jenis pekerjaan. 
  8. Mendukung investigasi insiden, near miss, maupun accident di lingkungan galangan, termasuk root cause analysis dan penyusunan tindakan pencegahan. 
  9. Berkoordinasi dengan tim produksi, docking, engineering, serta owner/class surveyor untuk memastikan aktivitas ship repair memenuhi standar keselamatan dan persyaratan klasifikasi kapal. 
  10. Menyusun laporan K3 shipyard secara berkala, termasuk statistik kecelakaan, hasil inspeksi, temuan audit, serta rekomendasi peningkatan safety performance. 
  11. Mengoordinasikan program emergency response di galangan, termasuk fire drill, confined space rescue, oil spill response, serta kesiapsiagaan kondisi darurat di atas kapal. 
  12. Mendukung penerapan budaya Zero Accident dan continuous improvement dalam sistem keselamatan kerja di lingkungan ship repair
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan Minimal D3 di bidang:
    a. Keselamatan dan Kesehatan Kerja (K3) 
    b. Teknik Mesin 
    c. Teknik Perkapalan / Teknik Kelautan 
    d. Teknik Industri Atau jurusan lain yang relevan
  2. Pengalaman Kerja Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman sebagai Safety Officer/HSE, diutamakan di bidang: 
    a. Operasional galangan kapal 
    b. Proyek ship repair 
    c. Industri maritim/offshore 
    d. Manufaktur berat atau konstruksi
    e. Memiliki pengalaman dalam aktivitas dry dock atau floating dock menjadi nilai tambah.
  3. Memahami standar dan regulasi K3 yang berlaku, seperti: 
    a. Peraturan K3 Nasional 
    b. Praktik keselamatan maritim (IMO) 
    c. ISO 45001 (lebih disukai) 
    4. Persyaratan keselamatan dari klasifikasi kapal (Class Rules)

title: QC IH Staff - PMP
raw_description:
1. Melakukan monitoring dan pengukuran faktor bahaya lingkungan kerja (fisik, kimia, dan biologi) secara berkala. 
  2. Melaksanakan inspeksi area kerja terkait aspek Industrial Hygiene (kebisingan, debu, pencahayaan, suhu kerja, gas, dll). 
  3. Mengidentifikasi potensi bahaya kesehatan kerja dan risiko paparan di lingkungan kerja. 
  4. Melakukan pengambilan sampel lingkungan kerja sesuai standar IH dan K3. 
  5. Mengolah dan menganalisis data hasil pengukuran IH serta membuat laporan evaluasi. 
  6. Memberikan rekomendasi pengendalian risiko kesehatan kerja (engineering, administrative, dan APD). 
  7. Memastikan implementasi program Industrial Hygiene sesuai SOP, standar K3, dan regulasi yang berlaku. 
  8. Berkoordinasi dengan tim HSE, QC, dan departemen terkait terkait temuan IH di lapangan. 
  9. Mendukung pelaksanaan audit internal maupun eksternal terkait K3 dan lingkungan kerja.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan:
    - Minimal D3/S1 Kesehatan Masyarakat (K3), Teknik Lingkungan, Teknik Industri, atau jurusan relevan
    - Diutamakan memiliki peminatan K3 atau Industrial Hygiene
  2. Pengalaman: 
    - Minimal 1-2 tahun pengalaman di bidang K3, Industrial Hygiene, atau QC Environment 
    - Fresh graduate dengan pengalaman magang di bidang K3/IH dipersilakan (untuk level junior)
  3. Kompetensi Teknis: 
    - Memahami konsep Industrial Hygiene dan Kesehatan Kerja 
    - Memahami regulasi K3 dan kesehatan kerja di Indonesia 
    - Mampu melakukan pengukuran lingkungan kerja (noise, dust, lighting, heat stress, gas, dll) 
    - Mampu membuat laporan monitoring dan evaluasi IH 
    - Menguasai Microsoft Office (terutama Excel dan Word) 
    - Memahami HIRADC / Risk Assessment menjadi nilai tambah

title: Software Quality Assurance - MODA
raw_description:
1. Merancang rencana pengujian, skenario, skrip, atau prosedur pengujian.
  2. Menyusun jadwal atau strategi pengujian sesuai dengan ruang lingkup proyek dan tenggat waktu pengiriman.
  3. Mengidentifikasi, menganalisis, dan mendokumentasikan masalah terkait fungsi program, output, tampilan layar, atau konten menggunakan sistem pelacakan bug serta melaporkan cacat kepada pengembang perangkat lunak.
  4. Berpartisipasi dalam tinjauan desain produk untuk memberikan masukan terkait persyaratan fungsional, desain produk, jadwal, atau potensi masalah.
  5. Memberikan umpan balik serta rekomendasi kepada pengembang mengenai kegunaan dan fungsionalitas perangkat lunak.
  6. Merancang dan mengembangkan alat pengujian otomatis.
  7. Mengkoordinasikan serta melaksanakan User Acceptance Test (UAT) dan pelatihan pengguna.
  8. Menyelidiki masalah pelanggan yang dirujuk oleh tim dukungan teknis.
raw_requirements:
1. Lulusan Sarjana dari Jurusan Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika atau Sistem Informasi.
  2. Pengalaman kerja sebagai Software Quality Assurance (SQA) minimal 0-2 tahun.
  3. Mampu mengestimasi effort dalam pengujian perangkat lunak.
  4. Memahami serta mampu membuat dokumen skenario pengujian dan UAT serta mengeksekusinya dengan baik.
  5. Memahami dan memiliki pengalaman menggunakan alat pengujian otomatis (Katalon).
  6. Mampu berkomunikasi dengan pengguna maupun tim pengembang internal.

major.reason: Sangat Cocok! Pekerjaan ini secara eksplisit mencari lulusan Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau bidang IT/Komputer.
