title: Finance & Accounting Admin - MODA
raw_description:
• Menyusun dan melakukan pencatatan laporan keuangan bulanan dan tahunan sesuai standar akuntansi yang berlaku. 
  • Mengelola akun piutang (Account Receivable/AR), termasuk penagihan dan rekonsiliasi pembayaran dari pelanggan. 
  • Mengelola akun utang (Account Payable/AP), termasuk verifikasi invoice dan pembayaran kepada vendor. 
  • Melakukan pencatatan, monitoring, dan pengelolaan aset tetap perusahaan, termasuk perhitungan depresiasi. 
  • Menyusun dan mengelola laporan perpajakan (PPN, PPh) serta memastikan kepatuhan terhadap peraturan pajak yang berlaku. 
  • Melakukan input dan pengelolaan transaksi keuangan dalam sistem akuntansi (SAP). 
  • Melakukan rekonsiliasi bank dan kas. 
  • Mendukung proses audit internal dan eksternal. 
  • Membuat laporan keuangan pendukung untuk keperluan manajemen. 
  • Menjaga keteraturan dokumen keuangan dan perpajakan perusahaan. 
  • Bekerja sama dengan tim finance dan divisi lain untuk memastikan kelancaran proses administrasi keuangan.
raw_requirements:
• Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 di bidang Akuntansi, Keuangan, atau bidang terkait.
  • Memiliki pengalaman minimal 2-5 tahun di posisi serupa.
  • Menguasai prinsip dasar akuntansi dan keuangan.
  • Mampu mengoperasikan Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, dan PowerPoint).
  • Pengalaman menggunakan software akuntansi (SAP).
  • Memiliki pengetahuan tentang perpajakan.
  • Teliti, detail-oriented, dan memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik.
  • Multitasking dan memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik.
  • Memiliki integritas tinggi dan mampu menjaga kerahasiaan data perusahaan.

title: B2B Sales Digital - MODA
raw_description:
1. Mencari dan mengembangkan prospek serta calon pelanggan potensial hingga tercapai kesepakatan kerja sama (closed deal).
  2. Memberikan dan mempresentasikan informasi yang detail mengenai produk dan layanan digital kepada calon pelanggan.
  3. Melaksanakan aktivitas customer prospecting untuk meningkatkan data prospek pelanggan serta menyusun laporan aktivitas.
  4. Memantau dan mengevaluasi pelaksanaan strategi pemasaran yang dijalankan.
  5. Menganalisis kebutuhan pelanggan dan berkoordinasi dengan tim Product Specialist untuk memberikan solusi digital yang optimal.
  6. Menyusun struktur biaya untuk setiap aktivitas pembelian, termasuk untuk pesanan baru maupun repeat order.
  7. Mengusulkan ide dan konsep produk yang mendukung pencapaian target pendapatan perusahaan.
  8. Mengelola proses penjualan secara end-to-end dengan pelanggan, termasuk menyiapkan penawaran harga akhir dan kontrak.
  9. Berkolaborasi dengan tim Legal dalam pengajuan, peninjauan, dan finalisasi kontrak serta Service Level Agreement (SLA).
  10. Memantau pembayaran pelanggan secara bulanan.
  11. Menanggapi pertanyaan pelanggan terkait produk secara akurat dan tepat waktu.
raw_requirements:
1. Pendidikan minimal S1 dari semua jurusan.
  2. Memiliki pengalaman minimal 2 tahun di bidang Sales Software.
  3. Terbukti mampu menangani jumlah akun yang cukup besar.
  4. Berorientasi pada pelanggan, memiliki visi serta business sense yang baik.
  5. Memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik.
  6. Individu yang mandiri (self-starter) dengan kemampuan interpersonal, negosiasi, kepemimpinan, dan kerja tim yang sangat baik.

title: Manage Service IoT & Digitalisasi - GSI
raw_description:
1. Melakukan perbaikan serta memberikan dukungan teknis pada perangkat IoT apabila terjadi deviasi.

2. Melakukan monitoring terhadap fungsi dan data perangkat IoT serta Digitalisasi Produk.

3. Melakukan monitoring platform IoT & AI di seluruh job site melalui dashboard pihak pertama.

4. Melakukan tindakan korektif apabila terjadi deviasi pada perangkat IoT dan Digitalisasi Produk.

5. Melakukan Quality Control terhadap perangkat IoT di lokasi sesuai jadwal dan timeframe yang ditetapkan oleh pihak pertama.

6. Melakukan sweeping atau pengecekan seluruh perangkat hardware IoT dan Digitalisasi Produk di job site.

9. Melakukan deployment software dan patching pada perangkat IoT dan Digitalisasi Produk sesuai jadwal dan timeframe.

10. Menyusun dokumentasi instalasi perangkat IoT dan Digitalisasi Produk di job site.

11. Menyusun laporan Berita Acara Serah Terima (BAST) setiap bulan.

12. Tim Managed Service bersedia untuk dimobilisasi dan ditugaskan ke area job site sesuai kebutuhan.

• Pendidikan minimal SMK Jurusan Elektro atau Informatika, atau D3/D4/S1 Jurusan Teknik Informatika. Untuk lulusan SMK wajib memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 1 (satu) tahun pada bidang yang relevan, sedangkan lulusan D3/D4/S1 dipersilakan melamar sebagai fresh graduate. Kandidat yang memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 1 (satu) tahun pada bidang yang relevan akan menjadi nilai tambah.
  • Memiliki pengetahuan terkait trouble shooting Network, Lan atau sejenisnya yang berkaitan dengan jaringan.
  • Wajib memiliki SIM C yang masih berlaku.
  • Wajib memiliki smartphone berbasis Android untuk mendukung pelaksanaan pekerjaan.
  • Wajib mencantumkan kota tempat tinggal saat ini pada CV yang dilampirkan.
  • Bersedia ditempatkan di lokasi kerja yang ditentukan 
  • Bersedia bekerja sebagai Tenaga Alih Daya (TAD)

• Pendidikan minimal SMK Jurusan Elektro atau Informatika, atau D3/D4/S1 Jurusan Teknik Informatika. major.reason: Sangat Cocok! Pekerjaan ini secara eksplisit mencari lulusan Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau bidang IT/Komputer.

gpa.reason: Sesuai. Tidak ada syarat IPK minimal yang tertulis secara eksplisit.

age.reason: Sesuai. Tidak ada batas usia maksimal yang disebutkan secara spesifik.

toefl.reason: Sesuai. Tidak ada syarat nilai TOEFL tertulis secara spesifik.

gender.reason: Sesuai. Lowongan terbuka untuk Pria dan Wanita.

skills.reason: Cocok. Menemukan beberapa kecocokan kata kunci keahlian: it.

experience.reason: Cocok. Peran ini di bidang Data / IT / Analis yang sesuai dengan spesialisasi pekerjaan Anda.

exp_years.reason: Sesuai. Terbuka untuk Fresh Graduate / pengalaman ≤ 1 tahun.

title: Head of Creative, Marketing (Pekanbaru/Medan)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Head of Creative, Marketing (Pekanbaru/Medan)

Daftar Sekarang

Sumatra, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Memberikan arahan kreatif secara menyeluruh untuk seluruh organisasi.

Bertanggung jawab atas keseluruhan ekuitas merek (brand equity) SawitPRO, termasuk positioning di pasar.

Bertanggung jawab atas positioning produk dan merek untuk seluruh produk dan layanan SawitPRO.

Memimpin dan mengelola strategi konten untuk proyek berskala kecil maupun besar, termasuk membuat pedoman dan template untuk desain merek, copywriting, visual, dan aset digital.

Melakukan audit terhadap seluruh hasil karya kreatif dari berbagai tim serta memberikan saran perbaikan untuk meningkatkan keterlibatan dan pengalaman pengguna.

Berpartisipasi dalam seluruh sesi kreatif dan brainstorming dari berbagai tim untuk memberikan ide-ide baru dan inovatif dalam pengembangan produk, peluncuran kampanye pemasaran, serta operasional bisnis.

Mengembangkan pemahaman yang mendalam mengenai persona pelanggan sasaran dan berperan sebagai konsultan internal dalam menentukan pendekatan yang efektif maupun yang kurang efektif bagi pengguna.

Mengajarkan tim untuk mendorong batas kreativitas meskipun dengan keterbatasan anggaran dan waktu.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

Kreativitas Pemasaran - Mengawasi, membimbing, dan mengarahkan hasil kreatif dari seluruh kampanye pemasaran SawitPRO, baik secara online maupun offline.

Kreativitas Desain Produk - Melakukan audit dan memberikan rekomendasi perbaikan terhadap desain produk yang dikembangkan oleh tim Product Management.

Tim Loyalty Management - Membantu dalam proses ideasi, pembuatan, dan perancangan konsep-konsep baru yang inovatif untuk mendorong pertumbuhan program loyalitas.

Tim Customer Experience - Bekerja sama dengan tim eCommerce dan Sales untuk menciptakan ide-ide kreatif yang dapat meningkatkan penjualan produk eCommerce maupun produk offline. Meningkatkan keterlibatan dan loyalitas pelanggan.

Kreativitas Operasional - Bekerja sama dengan tim operasional untuk merancang dan menghasilkan cara-cara kreatif dalam menjalankan operasional bisnis, mulai dari pengelolaan kantor, pengumpulan umpan balik pengguna, pengiriman produk, hingga penyelenggaraan webinar bagi pengguna.

Mengawasi tim lintas fungsi yang terdiri dari Graphic Designer, Copywriter, Social Media Specialist, Photographer/Videographer, dan Product Manager dalam pengembangan strategi komunikasi serta hasil kerja yang akan disampaikan.

Menyelenggarakan sesi brainstorming bersama tim kreatif dengan tetap menerapkan pemikiran strategis untuk menghasilkan inisiatif yang inovatif, dapat diterapkan, dan tetap mempertimbangkan efisiensi anggaran.

Menunjukkan kepemimpinan dan kemampuan manajemen tim yang memadai dalam mendorong pelaksanaan ide-ide kreatif di dalam tim kreatif.

Kualifikasi

Pendidikan

Gelar Sarjana (S1) di bidang Computer Graphics, Game Design, Graphic Design, Industrial Design, Product Design, Interior Design, atau bidang seni kreatif lainnya.

Pengalaman

Minimal 10 tahun pengalaman bekerja sebagai Copywriter, Graphic Designer, Production Artist, Game Designer, Sketch Artist, Interior Designer, atau bidang kreatif terkait.

Memiliki pengalaman dalam mengembangkan model bisnis yang inovatif serta mengembangkan saluran bisnis, model bisnis, atau transformasi bisnis.

Memiliki pengalaman di industri yang berorientasi pada konsumen seperti Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG), perbankan konsumen, asuransi digital, FinTech, sharing economy, dan sejenisnya menjadi nilai tambah.

Memiliki rekam jejak yang terbukti dalam menghasilkan desain kreatif mulai dari tahap ide hingga implementasi.

Memiliki pengetahuan tentang industri kelapa sawit menjadi nilai tambah.

Memiliki pemahaman yang mendalam mengenai berbagai saluran komunikasi, pemasaran, dan periklanan, baik online maupun offline.

Memiliki pengalaman yang terbukti dalam mengelola tim, stakeholder, serta mengawasi proyek desain berskala besar.

Pengetahuan/Keterampilan

Memiliki pemahaman yang mendalam mengenai perilaku, motivasi, dan karakteristik manusia.

Memiliki kemampuan kreativitas visual dan desain grafis yang sangat baik, serta memahami penggunaan warna, tipografi, tata letak, bahasa, persepsi manusia, dan elemen desain lainnya.

Memiliki pemahaman bisnis yang kuat, termasuk pengetahuan spesifik mengenai industri manufaktur, perusahaan berbasis sumber daya alam, serta unit bisnisnya.

Memiliki kemampuan berpikir kreatif, analitis, strategis, konseptual, serta keterampilan konsultasi yang sangat baik.

Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi lisan dan tulisan yang sangat baik, termasuk kemampuan menjelaskan konsep serta teknologi digital kepada para pemimpin bisnis, maupun menjelaskan konsep bisnis kepada berbagai pihak.

Memiliki semangat yang tinggi, idealisme yang kuat, serta visi untuk berkontribusi dalam mewujudkan masa depan Indonesia yang lebih baik.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO adalah perusahaan inovatif yang berkomitmen untuk meningkatkan kualitas hidup seluruh pelaku di industri kelapa sawit. SawitPRO mengembangkan platform agrikultur terintegrasi dari hulu hingga hilir (end-to-end), yang menciptakan manfaat bagi manusia, lingkungan, dan keberlanjutan bisnis. Misi kami adalah meningkatkan kesejahteraan pekebun kelapa sawit swadaya di Indonesia, membuka peluang nilai tambah bagi industri, serta mendorong daya saing di pasar global melalui penerapan ketertelusuran (traceability) dan keberlanjutan produk kelapa sawit.

Kami menyediakan platform yang menghubungkan seluruh pemangku kepentingan dalam rantai pasok industri kelapa sawit, seperti Pabrik Kelapa Sawit (PKS), agen, pekebun swadaya, dan penyedia sarana produksi pertanian. Kami membangun ekosistem digital yang menghilangkan hambatan dalam proses bisnis serta meningkatkan produktivitas pekebun melalui akses terhadap sarana produksi pertanian berkualitas dengan harga terjangkau, layanan agronomi, dan benih unggul berkualitas tinggi.

Kami memiliki visi untuk menjadi penggerak perubahan yang mampu meningkatkan taraf hidup pekebun swadaya sekaligus membantu mewujudkan pemenuhan kebutuhan global akan minyak sawit berkelanjutan.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Finance, Accounting, and Tax Executive (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Finance, Accounting, and Tax Executive (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive

Finance, Accounting, and Tax Executive

to

join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for managing day-to-day finance operations,

preparing accurate financial reports, ensuring tax compliance, and supporting internal audits.

You will also play a key role in streamlining accounting processes and providing insights that

support better financial decision-making.

Responsibilities

Prepare accurate and timely financial reports, including Balance Sheet, Profit & Loss, and Cash Flow.

Handle daily accounting transactions, journal entries, and month-end closing activities.

Ensure proper reconciliation of accounts, including VAT and the general ledger.

Prepare and submit tax calculations and filings (PPh 21, PPh 22, PPh 23, PPh 25/29, PPh 26, VAT, Final Tax).

Review invoices, payments, and supporting documentation for accuracy and compliance.

Monitor accounts payable (AP) and accounts receivable (AR) to maintain cash flow efficiency.

Coordinate with external auditors, tax consultants, and relevant authorities for compliance and audit requirements.

Ensure compliance with Indonesian accounting standards, tax regulations, and internal company policies.

Provide recommendations to improve efficiency and accuracy in financial and tax processes.

Kualifikasi

Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field from a reputable university.

2-3 years of experience in finance, accounting, or tax (experience in a similar industry is a plus).

Strong knowledge of Indonesian tax regulations and reporting (e-SPT, e-Faktur, e-Bupot, etc.).

Proficiency in accounting software (MYOB, Accurate, SAP, or similar) and Microsoft Excel.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with high attention to detail.

Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and perform well under pressure.

Good communication and interpersonal skills to collaborate across teams.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

Daftar Sekarang

title: E-Commerce Executive (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

E-Commerce Executive (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (Full WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Primary Responsibilities

Own, lead and drive the eCommerce business of SawitPRO called Toko Sawit

To drive the online demand for goods and services sold by SawitPRO

Work with different departments to ensure a comprehensive eCommerce strategy for capturing market share, market development and sales of toko Sawit

Ensure high adoption of Toko Sawit

Define the SLAs for Toko Sawit online business

Work closely with operations team to ensure on-time fulfillment of online orders

Own P&L responsibility of Toko Sawit constantly driving towards higher revenues and profits

Role of the eCommerce Executive

eCommerce Strategy

- Develop, own and constantly update end to end eCommerce business strategy for Toko Sawit through innovation and creativity

Customer Experience Management

- Ensure highest standards of online shopping experience for Toko Sawit customers

Category Management

- Ensure the most sought after products are always listed in the product catalog of Toko Sawit. Continuously source for high revenue, high profit products to be listed on Toko Sawit

Revenue Management

- Come up with innovative pricing strategies for products to optimise revenues while serving the

best price guarantee

of SawitPRO

Sales Growth

- Maximise sales revenues for online sales through constant growth of customer base, product catalog, best pricing and customer satisfaction

User adoption

- Ensure high levels of recurring revenue from the existing users, referral business and other strategies for highest standards of user adoption

Promotions and marketing

- Work with marketing team to launch innovative online marketing campaigns and promotions for building the SawitPRO and Toko Sawit brands

Partnerships

-

Collaborate with partnership team to maximise online to offline (O2O) sales, revenues and profits

Performance monitoring

- Constantly monitor Toko Sawit performance to ensure maximum availability of Toko Sawit products. Close inventory monitoring with the operations team to maximize product availability across all regions

eCommerce Loyalty

- Develop loyalty programs for online shopping

Execution KPIs

– clearly define execution goals and KPIs to deliver on the experience portfolio of the organization

P & L

- Manage revenue and costs generated from the online user base

Kualifikasi

Education

Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Business or Marketing discipline is required.

Experience

Min. 2 years’ experience working in eCommerce business, preferably with some independent P&L responsibilities

Experience in innovating business models and developing new channels, business models or business transformation

Palm oil industry knowledge would be helpful

- Constantly monitor Toko Sawit performance to ensure maximum availability of Toko Sawit products. Close inventory monitoring with the operations team to maximize product availability across all regions

eCommerce Loyalty

- Develop loyalty programs for online shopping

Execution KPIs

– clearly define execution goals and KPIs to deliver on the experience portfolio of the organization

P & L

- Manage revenue and costs generated from the online user base

Kualifikasi

Education

Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Business or Marketing discipline is required.

Experience

Min. 2 years’ experience working in eCommerce business, preferably with some independent P&L responsibilities

Experience in innovating business models and developing new channels, business models or business transformation

Palm oil industry knowledge would be helpful

title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend (Medan)
location: Medan, Medan City, North Sumatra, Indonesia
raw_description:
< Kembali

Senior Software Engineer, Backend (Medan)

Daftar Sekarang

Medan, Medan City, North Sumatra, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Participate in the complete backend services development life cycle.

Develop backend services according to API specifications.

Integrate external / third party services.

Perform system analysis, design, testing, and documentation whenever necessary.

Write testing for unit and system integration.

Maintain code quality, unit testing, and automation

Provide technical support on on-call rotations.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor's Degree, or Master's Degree, in Computer Science / IT, Engineering (Computer/Telecommunication), or equivalent.

Proficiency in Golang as primary language and other languages such as Java.

Proficiency in Git

Proficiency in PostgreSQL

At least 4 years working experience in backend services using Golang and Postgres database.

Knowledge of RESTful APIs and microservices, experience designing & consuming them

Experience in designing OpenAPI-based API.

Experience in working in cross-functional teams.

Have discipline in writing unit tests and integration tests.

Familiarity with development on cloud services such as GCP and/or AWS.

Familiarity with continuous integration and continuous deployment.

Familiarity with the Scrum development process.

Ready to be placed in Medan or willing to relocate there.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

title: IT Support (Jakarta)
raw_description:
< Kembali

IT Support (Jakarta)

Daftar Sekarang

Jakarta, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Provide on-site technical support to our clients, identifying, diagnosing, and resolving issues.

Communicate effectively with clients to understand their needs and explain complex technical issues in an understandable manner.

Relay information and report issues to the engineering team at HQ, ensuring a smooth flow of information.

Coordinate with the engineering team to implement solutions and rectify problems.

Ensure customer satisfaction through proactive and reactive measures.

Provide training to customers on how to effectively use our products and services.

Stay updated on the latest products, services, and policies to provide accurate information to clients.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field, or equivalent practical experience.

Minimum 3 years of experience as an IT Support Engineer or similar customer-facing technical support role.

Strong technical troubleshooting skills with the ability to diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network-related issues.

Extensive knowledge of MikroTik RouterOS, including router configuration, firewall, VPN, bandwidth management, and network troubleshooting.

Able to design and set up office networks from scratch, including LAN/WAN infrastructure, routing, switching, wireless configuration, and internet connectivity.

Knowledgeable in configuring and managing wireless access points and networking devices such as Ubiquiti, Ruijie, and similar brands.

Extensive knowledge of Multi-Function Printers (MFP), including setup, troubleshooting, scanning, network printing, and maintenance.

Knowledgeable in CCTV systems, including installation, configuration, monitoring, and troubleshooting of IP camera systems and NVR/DVR devices.

Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills with a strong customer-centric attitude.

Ability to explain complex technical concepts and issues to non-technical users clearly and professionally.

Experience coordinating with internal engineering or technical teams to resolve escalated issues efficiently.

Willingness to travel to customer locations as required.

Willing to undertake a probation/training period in Pekanbaru.

Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and respond effectively under pressure.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil industry. SawitPRO develops an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for people, planet and profit. Our missions are to improve the livelihood of Indonesia’s smallholders, to unlock value for the industry, and to strive in a demanding global market in traceability and sustainability of palm oil products.

We provide platforms that connect the supply chain stakeholders within the palm oil industry (i.e. Palm Oil Mills, Agents, Smallholders, and Agri Input vendors), create a digital ecosystem that removes friction points, and essentially boosts the productivity of the smallholders via access to affordable yet high quality agro-inputs, agronomic services, and high-quality planting materials.

We envision to be the game-changer that improves smallholders’ living standard, and helps our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil.

Daftar Sekarang

title: Event Organizer (Pekanbaru)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Event Organizer (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Summary

:

The Event Marketing Coordinator plays a crucial role in the promotion and execution of events related to a digital loyalty platform specific to the Palm Oil Industry, with a focus on the Upstream and Midstream sectors. This role involves planning and coordinating various marketing activities, including trade shows, conferences, webinars, and industry networking events. The Event Marketing Coordinator works closely with cross-functional teams, industry partners, and stakeholders to ensure successful event experiences that drive engagement and enhance the platform's visibility in the market.

Responsibilities:

Event Planning and Execution: Plan, coordinate, and execute events aligned with the marketing strategy and objectives of the digital loyalty platform in the Palm Oil Industry. This includes identifying suitable events, managing event logistics, coordinating with vendors, and ensuring timely execution.

Event Marketing: Develop and implement event marketing campaigns to promote events and generate attendance. Utilize various channels, such as email marketing, social media, and industry publications, to maximize event visibility and attract target audiences.

Collateral and Content Development: Create event-related collateral, such as brochures, presentations, and promotional materials. Collaborate with the marketing team to develop compelling event content, including speaker profiles, session descriptions, and educational resources.

Industry Networking: Establish and maintain relationships with industry associations, organizations, and influencers. Actively participate in industry networking events and build strategic partnerships to expand the platform's reach and enhance its industry presence.

Event Analysis and Reporting: Measure and evaluate event performance through post-event analysis. Analyze metrics, such as attendance, lead generation, and attendee feedback, to assess event success and provide insights for future event planning and optimization.

Budget Management: Develop event budgets, track expenses, and ensure adherence to allocated budgets. Negotiate contracts and agreements with vendors, venues, and service providers to maximize cost-effectiveness.

Cross-functional Collaboration: Collaborate with the marketing team, sales team, product managers, and other stakeholders to ensure event strategies align with overall marketing and business goals. Coordinate with internal teams to secure speaker participation, organize product demonstrations, and provide event support.

Project Management: Effectively manage multiple event projects simultaneously, ensuring deadlines, deliverables, and budgets are met. Employ project management methodologies to streamline processes, enhance efficiency, and improve overall event experiences.

Kualifikasi

Requirements:

Education: Bachelor's degree in marketing, communications, business administration, or a related field. Relevant certifications in event management are a plus.

Experience: 3-5 years of experience in event planning, event marketing, or related roles. Experience in organizing and executing events within the Palm Oil Industry or a similar industry is highly desirable.

Industry Knowledge: Strong understanding of the Palm Oil Industry, specifically the Upstream and Midstream sectors. Familiarity with industry events, trade shows, conferences, and key stakeholders is preferred.

Event Management: Demonstrated experience in event planning, logistics management, and execution. Proven ability to handle multiple events simultaneously, work under pressure, and meet tight deadlines.

Marketing and Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to create compelling event content and effectively communicate event details to diverse audiences. Proficiency in social media marketing and email marketing is desirable.

Relationship Building: Strong networking and relationship-building skills to engage with industry partners, vendors, and event participants. Ability to establish and maintain relationships with key stakeholders.

Analytical and Reporting Abilities: Proficiency in analyzing event data, generating reports, and extracting actionable insights. Strong attention to detail in tracking event metrics and measuring event success.

Budgeting and Financial Management: Experience in event budget development, expense tracking, and contract negotiation. Ability to manage budgets effectively and maximize cost-efficiency.

Creativity and Problem-Solving: Innovative thinking and problem-solving skills to overcome challenges, identify opportunities, and enhance event experiences. Ability to think strategically and deliver unique event concepts.

Flexibility and Adaptability: Willingness to work in a dynamic and fast-paced environment. Ability to adapt plans and strategies based on changing priorities and emerging industry trends.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil Industry.

Our mission is to develop an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for People, Planet and Prosperity. Our Vision is to help palm oil smallholders become more PROficient in farming practices, so that they can produce more FFB crop, resulting in greater PROsperity for indigenous communities, also creating PROfitability for our business, PROtection of the natural environment and PROgress of Indonesia

SawitPRO is a game-changer, improving the smallholders’ living standard and helping our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil through efficient land use.

raw_requirements:
< Kembali

Event Organizer (Pekanbaru)

Daftar Sekarang

Pekanbaru, Pekanbaru City, Riau, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full Time (WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Summary

:

The Event Marketing Coordinator plays a crucial role in the promotion and execution of events related to a digital loyalty platform specific to the Palm Oil Industry, with a focus on the Upstream and Midstream sectors. This role involves planning and coordinating various marketing activities, including trade shows, conferences, webinars, and industry networking events. The Event Marketing Coordinator works closely with cross-functional teams, industry partners, and stakeholders to ensure successful event experiences that drive engagement and enhance the platform's visibility in the market.

Responsibilities:

Event Planning and Execution: Plan, coordinate, and execute events aligned with the marketing strategy and objectives of the digital loyalty platform in the Palm Oil Industry. This includes identifying suitable events, managing event logistics, coordinating with vendors, and ensuring timely execution.

Event Marketing: Develop and implement event marketing campaigns to promote events and generate attendance. Utilize various channels, such as email marketing, social media, and industry publications, to maximize event visibility and attract target audiences.

Collateral and Content Development: Create event-related collateral, such as brochures, presentations, and promotional materials. Collaborate with the marketing team to develop compelling event content, including speaker profiles, session descriptions, and educational resources.

Industry Networking: Establish and maintain relationships with industry associations, organizations, and influencers. Actively participate in industry networking events and build strategic partnerships to expand the platform's reach and enhance its industry presence.

Event Analysis and Reporting: Measure and evaluate event performance through post-event analysis. Analyze metrics, such as attendance, lead generation, and attendee feedback, to assess event success and provide insights for future event planning and optimization.

Budget Management: Develop event budgets, track expenses, and ensure adherence to allocated budgets. Negotiate contracts and agreements with vendors, venues, and service providers to maximize cost-effectiveness.

Cross-functional Collaboration: Collaborate with the marketing team, sales team, product managers, and other stakeholders to ensure event strategies align with overall marketing and business goals. Coordinate with internal teams to secure speaker participation, organize product demonstrations, and provide event support.

Project Management: Effectively manage multiple event projects simultaneously, ensuring deadlines, deliverables, and budgets are met. Employ project management methodologies to streamline processes, enhance efficiency, and improve overall event experiences.

Kualifikasi

Requirements:

Education: Bachelor's degree in marketing, communications, business administration, or a related field. Relevant certifications in event management are a plus.

Experience: 3-5 years of experience in event planning, event marketing, or related roles. Experience in organizing and executing events within the Palm Oil Industry or a similar industry is highly desirable.

Industry Knowledge: Strong understanding of the Palm Oil Industry, specifically the Upstream and Midstream sectors. Familiarity with industry events, trade shows, conferences, and key stakeholders is preferred.

Event Management: Demonstrated experience in event planning, logistics management, and execution. Proven ability to handle multiple events simultaneously, work under pressure, and meet tight deadlines.

Marketing and Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to create compelling event content and effectively communicate event details to diverse audiences. Proficiency in social media marketing and email marketing is desirable.

Relationship Building: Strong networking and relationship-building skills to engage with industry partners, vendors, and event participants. Ability to establish and maintain relationships with key stakeholders.

Analytical and Reporting Abilities: Proficiency in analyzing event data, generating reports, and extracting actionable insights. Strong attention to detail in tracking event metrics and measuring event success.

Budgeting and Financial Management: Experience in event budget development, expense tracking, and contract negotiation. Ability to manage budgets effectively and maximize cost-efficiency.

Creativity and Problem-Solving: Innovative thinking and problem-solving skills to overcome challenges, identify opportunities, and enhance event experiences. Ability to think strategically and deliver unique event concepts.

Flexibility and Adaptability: Willingness to work in a dynamic and fast-paced environment. Ability to adapt plans and strategies based on changing priorities and emerging industry trends.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the Palm Oil Industry.

Our mission is to develop an integrated end-to-end agri-platform, creating a win-win-win for People, Planet and Prosperity. Our Vision is to help palm oil smallholders become more PROficient in farming practices, so that they can produce more FFB crop, resulting in greater PROsperity for indigenous communities, also creating PROfitability for our business, PROtection of the natural environment and PROgress of Indonesia

SawitPRO is a game-changer, improving the smallholders’ living standard and helping our planet to meet the growing global demand for sustainable palm oil through efficient land use.

title: Fullstack Engineer Intern (Pekanbaru/Medan)
raw_description:
< Kembali

Fullstack Engineer Intern (Pekanbaru/Medan)

Daftar Sekarang

​

Tipe Pekerjaan

Internship (Full WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

Responsibilities:

Participate in the complete development life cycle.

Develop backend services according to API specifications.

Develop internal tools

Integrate external / third party services.

Perform system analysis, design, testing, and documentation whenever necessary.

Write testing for unit and system integration.

Maintain code quality, unit testing, and automation.

Provide technical support on on-call rotations.

Kualifikasi

Educational background in Computer Science / IT, Engineering (Computer/Telecommunication), or equivalent.

Proficiency in Golang as primary language and other languages such as Java.

Proficiency in Git.

Proficiency in PostgreSQL.

Knowledge of RESTful APIs and microservices, experience designing & consuming them.

Experience in designing OpenAPI-based API.

Experience in working in cross-functional teams.

Have discipline in writing unit tests and integration tests.

Familiarity with development on cloud services such as GCP and/or AWS.

Familiarity with continuous integration and continuous deployment.

Familiarity with the Scrum development process.

Ready to be placed in Pekanbaru / Medan or willing to relocate there.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

Daftar Sekarang

title: [Talent Pool] Supply Chain Management (Kalimantan)
raw_description:
< Kembali

[Talent Pool] Supply Chain Management (Kalimantan)

Daftar Sekarang

Central Kalimantan, Indonesia

Tipe Pekerjaan

Full-Time (Full WFO)

Deskripsi Pekerjaan

SawitPRO is expanding its operation supply chain team into Kalimantan and is building a strong talent pipeline to support our future growth. We are looking for passionate and driven professionals with experience in Supply Chain to join our Talent Pool.

Open Position:

Warehouse Team (Supply Chain Coordinator, Warehouse Operator, etc.)

Logistic Team (Transport and Hub, First Last Mile, etc.)

General Responsibility:

Support end-to-end supply chain operations, including logistics, warehousing, inventory, and distribution.

Coordinate with internal teams and external partners to ensure the smooth flow of materials and operational activities.

Monitor inventory levels and ensure timely availability of materials and supplies.

Track inbound and outbound shipments to ensure on-time delivery and operational efficiency.

Analyze supply chain performance and identify opportunities for process improvements.

Prepare operational reports and maintain accurate supply chain documentation.

Ensure compliance with company policies, procedures, and safety standards.

Participate in continuous improvement initiatives to enhance supply chain efficiency and effectiveness.

Kualifikasi

Bachelor's degree (S1) in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Industrial Engineering, Business Administration, Agribusiness, or a related field.

Experience in Supply Chain, Procurement, Logistics, Warehouse, Inventory Management, Distribution, or other related functions is preferred.

Strong understanding of supply chain principles and operational processes.

Good analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Microsoft Excel.

Experience with ERP systems (Odoo) or Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) is an advantage.

Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively in a team environment.

Willing to travel for business purposes when required.

Willing to be based in Kalimantan according to business needs.

Tentang Perusahaan

SawitPRO is a cutting-edge green digital agritech startup located in the heart of Jakarta. Our mission is to be the best innovator that improves the lives of everyone in the palm oil industry. Through our integrated end-to-end agri-platform, we create a win-win-win scenario for people, planet, and prosperity.

We provide integrated apps that connect the supply chain stakeholders in the palm oil industry (Mills, DO Agents, Smallholders, Harvesters, Drivers, etc.). Creating a digital ecosystem that essentially boosts their productivity with effortless work documentation, affordable yet original agri-inputs, and agronomist services.

Our commitment extends beyond providing innovative solutions; we aim to nurture every aspect of Indonesia's palm oil industry. By fostering growth and sustainability, we strive to bring positive change to the lives of individuals in the palm oil sector, one at a time.

title: Sr Officer- Platform Product Owner- New Technology & Innovation
raw_description:
Job Description

Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage Agile delivery processes, including sprint planning, backlog grooming, User Acceptance Testing (UAT), and post-test coordination.
  • Create and maintain technical documentation such as Product Requirements Documents (PRDs), user flows, and business process documentation to align stakeholders, engineering teams, and third-party vendors.
  • Translate business requirements into comprehensive product solutions, covering UI/UX aspects, API integrations, and third-party system integrations.
  • Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, including Sales, Finance, IT, Design, and Marketing, to ensure successful product execution.
  • Conduct research on platform features and competitor offerings to inform product strategy and data-driven decision-making.
  • Measure the impact of released product changes or features to ensure tangible results that align with business targets.

Requirements & Qualifications:

  • 3+ years of experience in product management or as a Product Owner, with a proven track record in the telecommunications (B2B/B2C), IT services, or digital payment solutions industry.
  • Strong technical expertise in Agile Project Management and proficiency with task management software such as JIRA.
  • Strategic thinking and sharp decision-making skills to prioritize the product backlog effectively.
  • Proven experience in leading cross-functional teams and managing stakeholder collaboration.
  • High adaptability in fast-paced environments with strong multitasking capabilities.
  • Educational background in Business Informatics, Informatics Engineering, or other relevant fields that provide a foundation in technical understanding and digital innovation.
  • Excellent communication skills in both Indonesian and English.

title: AVP-Business Development
raw_description:
Job Details

Overview

Responsible for driving business solutioning growth within his/her vertical industry by enabling them to drive business growth, build strong partnerships, and contribute to the overall success of the organization. They specialized develop a network of contacts to attract clients, research new market opportunities and oversee growth projects, making sales projections and forecasting revenue, in line with projected income.

Requirements

Qualification:

  • Bachelor in Business Administration, Management, Marketing, Industrial Engineering, Informatics System or a related field. An MBA or relevant master’s degree can be advantageous.
  • Certifications in project management and business analysis are preferred.
  • Specialized knowledge in specific vertical industry, such as: Financial Services, Supply Chain, Government, and Energy

Experience

  • Work experienced as Account Manager, Business Development, Business Analyst, Product Manager in Solution Services or from reputable consulting service in Technology
  • Work experienced within vertical industry as employee min 5 years

Skills

  • Has broad relationship to private sectors or Government
  • Updated technology trends, especially in ICT Business
  • Experienced in project delivery
  • Multitasking tasking solved
  • Able to drives revenue growth (result oriented) while ensuring seamless collaborations

Responsibilities

  • Lead generation & account planning : Account Planning, industrial expert based on technology trends, fact Findings from client pain points and insight info, triggering new business initiatives with clients, orchestrating client requirements and internal capabilities
  • Solution design & architecture (RFPs): Defining clear problem statement based on customer’s pain points/ needs, solutioning driven by recommending solution best practices and involving the required pre-sales experts based on customer needs, joint planning sessions for lead sharing and pursuing integrated opportunities
  • Commercial proposal (RFQs): Responsible for putting together the client proposal (solution design, pricing, etc.), boxed solutions to be priced based on a predefined price list, bespoke services to be priced by Business Development and Solution Architect
  • Client negotiation: present the solution to the customers and negotiate contract (with help from other functions as needed), responsible for contract signing & booking
  • Service delivery: as part of steering committee, to align between delivery and plan
  • Renewals: involved reviewing on renewals

title: Officer-B2B Transportation & Logistic Solution
raw_description:
Job Details

Role Purpose:

Responsible for providing expert technical consultancy, designing robust solutions, developing compelling proposals, and performing business calculations for our suite of services. This includes Core Services (Internet, Connectivity, Fixed Phone, B2B Mobile) and advanced ICT services (IoT, Big Data, Security, Data Center & Cloud, System Integration). You will be a key technical partner to the sales team, helping to secure new business and ensure the solutions proposed are both technically sound and commercially viable.

 

Key Responsibilities:

  • Technical Consultation: Collaborate with the sales team to assess customer technical requirements and challenges.
  • Solution Design: Architect and design valid and implementable technical solutions that meet customer needs, utilizing a mix of Core and ICT services.
  • Business Analysis: Develop business cases and financial models to ensure the feasibility and profitability of proposed solutions.
  • Proposal Development: Create detailed technical documentation and presentations for sales proposals.
  • Project Handoff: Ensure a smooth transition of the designed solution to the service delivery team for implementation.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams (Product, Sales, Service Delivery) and external partners to deliver complex projects and respond to tenders.

 

Key Activities:

  • Asses the customer requirement
  • Do on desk survey to map with customer requirement
  • Create effective solution design with accurate technical requirement
  • Create business analysis as a reference for Sales team offer to the customer
  • Assist Sales team to present to the customer
  • Execute the project to be implemented by Service Delivery team.
  • Execute and achieve functional goals given by managers
  • Work co-operatively with other team members to accomplished delegated tasks assigned by managers
  • Provide support, when appropriate, for the team in cases of absence or unavailability
  • Provide continuous inputs on business process and systems improvement
  • Ensuring the delegated tasks are completed in timely and efficient manner
  • Team Up with respective Sales Division, and co-ordinate with other function within Indosat,
  • Collaboration with external parties (partners, vendors) to grab Big or Complex Project/Tender

Requirements

 

Qualification:

  • University graduate, in field of Telecommunication or Information Engineering with min 2 years experiences in Telco Operation/Planning/Project or Presales function.
  • Able to work under limited direction and use initiative and judgment
  • Flexible and adaptable in under pressure situations and meet short and long-term deadlines
  • Good in analytical and planning skill to translate customer requirement into matching product & solution

 

Skill & Competence:

  • Able to design and configure the Core & ICT Services
  • Able to run and manage the project in term of enterprise service

 

Business Acumen:

  • Understand and know the Market Segment of Enterprise Service
  • Understand the concept of basic business calculations, financial posture and investment analysis
  • Preferably has good understanding on logistics and supply chain industry landscape

 

Communication Skill:

  • Has a good communication skill in Bahasa and English
  • Has a good presentation skill
  • Fluent in English, having sound verbal and written communication, strong negotiation presentation and report writing skills

 

Certification:

Preferably candidate with below certifications is highly desirable:

  • Networking: Cisco (CCNA/CCNP) or equals (Huawei, Juniper etc)
  • Cloud: GCP Certified or equals AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert
  • Security: NSE Certification, CISSP or equals
  • AI Certification: AWS AI Practitioner, Certified Cloud AI Solutions Architect (CCASA) or equals

title: Sr Officer-BoQ Validation Management (Transport)
raw_description:
The job function as Sr Officer BoQ Validation Management: 

  • Conduct analysis and validation of program initiatives and technology solutions proposed by the respective technology domains.
  • High-level cost analysis of proposed programs to ensure alignment with End-to-End (E2E) network design and assess their long-term impact on network investments.
  • Analyze End-to-End scope of Transport Network programs (Microwave, IP, DWDM/Optical, FTTH and related transport support functions) to ensure alignment with the overall Annual Operating Plan (AOP) for Network Technology.
  • Evaluate and define Transport Network design principles and dimensioning standards for Microwave, IP, DWDM/Optical, FTTH and related transport support functions.
  • Establish and govern BoQ standards, validation methodologies, and scope assurance processes to ensure accurate, optimized, and cost-efficient network investments aligned with End-to-End network design, Annual Operating Plan (AOP), and strategic network objectives
  • Analyze material reuse opportunities and Asset Under Construction (AUC) considerations to optimize investment efficiency and ensure proper incorporation into proposed BoQs.
  • Provide constructive feedback and recommendations on proposed technology Solution and BoQs, applying cost-conscious principles while maintaining design integrity, project objectives, and execution timelines.

 

Qualification:

  • Preferably B.Sc. Degree (Electrical Engineering/Telecoms/Computer)
  • Fluency in English is required
  • Motivated, curious, & inquisitive to learn new things
  • Leader & team player that has the capability and eagerness to quickly pick up new knowledge in a fast pace, rapidly changing environment
  • Enthusiastic and positive
  • Sense of ownership and pro-activeness

 

Related Experience:

  • Minimum 3-5 years of work experience in telco industry with relevant network design and planning areas or network strategic sourcing
  • Preferable has experience on Transport network Design, Planning, dimensioning and network strategic sourcing

 

Skills:

  • Understanding end-to-end network transport architecture and industry standards, combined with strong commercial acumen in CAPEX/OPEX management, vendor procurement, and cost-effective design validation
  • Very Good knowledge of/experience with 4G/5G network principles and design for E2E transport design
  • Very Good knowledge of/experience with microwave link planning, IP/MPLS and Segment Routing configuration, optical DWDM network design, and utilizing NMS/SDN tools for network management and automation
  • Strong understanding of BoQ structure and pricing structure
  • Strong understanding of Mobile Network Architecture and Strategy
  • Strong expertise and hands-on experience in utilizing automation tools, including Excel, Tableau, AI Agent platforms, and other digital automation solutions

title: Sr Officer-Home Installation & Infrastructure
raw_description:
The Senior Officer – Home Installation & Infrastructure is responsible for ensuring the successful installation, activation, maintenance, and continuous improvement of fiber optic and FTTH (Fiber-to-the-Home) networks. The role supports end-to-end customer connectivity by performing home installations, troubleshooting service issues, maintaining network infrastructure, and coordinating with internal teams and external vendors to ensure service quality and SLA achievement.

 

Key Responsibilities:

1.Home Installation

  • Perform end-to-end internet and WiFi installations at customer premises.
  • Install and configure fiber optic connections, including cable pulling to customer locations.
  • Configure and activate modems, ONTs, routers, and IPTV services.
  • Conduct connection testing and internet speed verification to ensure service quality.
  • Provide basic education to customers on the use of WiFi equipment and internet services.
  • Perform initial troubleshooting during installation and resolve basic technical issues.
  • Ensure customers are successfully activated and connected to the network in accordance with company standards.

 

2.Infrastructure Management:

  • Execute the development, expansion, and maintenance of FTTH and fiber optic infrastructure.
  • Install and maintain network components, including ODPs, splitters, FATs, closures, poles, and related infrastructure.
  • Perform backbone and distribution fiber cable deployment activities.
  • Conduct field surveys and route assessments for network expansion projects.
  • Troubleshoot and repair fiber optic network disruptions to maintain service continuity.
  • Monitor network quality and recommend improvements where necessary.Support homepass expansion initiatives to increase network coverage.
  • Coordinate with infrastructure vendors and partners (e.g., IFORTE, Asianet, and other contractors) to ensure project execution and maintenance activities are completed effectively.
  • Ensure installation and maintenance activities meet the company's Service Level Agreement (SLA) targets and operational standards.

 

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree or Diploma in Telecommunications Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in FTTH installation, fiber optic infrastructure, or telecommunications network operations.
  • Strong understanding of fiber optic networks and FTTH infrastructure.
  • Hands-on experience in internet/WiFi installation and fiber optic network maintenance.
  • Proficient in configuring modems, ONTs, routers, and activating internet/IPTV services.
  • Knowledge of network infrastructure components, including ODPs, splitters, FATs, closures, poles, and related equipment.
  • Familiar with fiber optic backbone and distribution network architecture.
  • Strong troubleshooting skills for internet connectivity and fiber optic network issues.
  • Ability to perform network testing, quality monitoring, and basic diagnostic activities.
  • Experience conducting site surveys and planning cable routes.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills to effectively engage with customers, vendors, and internal stakeholders.
  • Able to work independently as well as collaboratively within field operations teams.
  • Willing to work in a mobile, field-based environment and meet operational targets.
  • Strong commitment to safety, service excellence, and achieving installation and maintenance SLAs.

title: Officer-Platinum Helpdesk
raw_description:
Role Purpose

  • Manage the team to do level-0 troubleshooting and escalate the problem by trouble ticketing system (problem identification)
  • Support for L1 Corporate MIDI Services Fault Localization and Handling any technical problem to internal Customer for Corporates Services (investigations, analysis, and problem solver)
  • To make sure the services provided to the customers meet the SLA committed in the contract (monitoring MTTR and Long outage Reduction).
  • Provide data for improvement actions on recurring incidents or requested by customers to increase after-sales service of Indosat’s corporate customer.

Job Details

  1. Operational Function
  • Performing handling complaint resolution from corporate customer (especially handled by EOS) related to service degradation and or service interruption.
  • Collecting and analyzing cases of resolution work which have complained by customers and make a decision and solution related to Indosat Ooredoo connectivity problem.
  • Coordination, escalation and follow-up tickets within Internal and External (3rd party) based on MTTR standard.
  • Supervise team properly to help its customer network complaint resolution.
  • Supervise long outage analyzation to find out the way to accelerate the recovery work.
  • Provide the Detail Handling Process History as requested by Related Team.
  • Meeting with Customer and Related Team as part of Indosat Corporate Problem Resolution
  1. Improvement activities
  • Providing data and Follow UP to QI and SM Team for improvement actions on recurring incidents  or requested by customers to increase after sales service of MIDI customer,
  1. Team Management
  • Monitor and evaluate the performance of vendors or outtask to have the best supporting team. Support project monitoring implementation that impact for Corporate customer
  • Responsible for team [agents] improvement hard skill and soft skill which is required by customer.

 

Qualification:

  • Background in Telecommunication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology Engineering (minimum Bachelor degree).
  • Certification on certain area (CCNA, expert of system, etc.) will be an advantage.

Experience:

  • Minimum 2-year experience in telecommunication system.
  • Wide understanding on telecommunication systems.
  • Good knowledge on quality and assurance process in telecommunication industry.
  • Understand business process within related functions.
  • Good understanding of project management
  • Some years experiences on telecommunication system operation will be useful.

Skill :

  • Good communication skills.
  • Good written and oral communication skills.
  • Strong analytical capability and skills.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office application.
  • Proficient in English.

Behavior Competency:

  • Translating strategy into action
  • Accelerate business and customer.
  • Decisiveness
  • Cultivate networks & partnerships.
  • Making a difference
  • Learning agility

title: AVP-Account Director SEA
raw_description:
Job Details

Role Purpose

The Account Director is responsible for strategic client management, ensuring long-term client satisfaction, revenue growth, and acting as the main liaison between clients and internal teams.

Find and pitch complex opportunities from existing or Greenfields Account. Orchestrating with internal and external stakeholder for Core,ICT and IoT and Techco project

 

The role consists of: nurturing and fastening large enterprise account to use Indosat B2B products & services, a “close win”. All team members approach with effective and efficient manner, increase the exposure of Indosat B2B products & services in the market place and customer centric focus to maintain loyalty.

 

Responsibility

 

Sales Execution

  • Plan and execute corporate sales activities for Indosat Business services.
  • Evaluate and create program to improve customer productivity in term of services usage.
  • Coordinate with Enterprise Sales Solution, Marketing, Product Development, Technical and other supporting functions concerning proposal preparation of offering solution and pricing that needed by customer.
  • Coordinate with Major Events to retain customer and increase customer loyalty.
  • Evaluate achievement of target production and revenue from Customer in Bank and Financial Segment

Account Management

  • Prospecting customer and regularly update customer with Indosat B2B products and services
  • Manage sales plan with sales team
  • Validate & update customer credit rating
  • Manage sales team activities
  • Manage all sales team pipeline & sales forecast
  • Cross/Up Selling
  • Manage Bid
  • Develop Sales Project Proposals
  • Manage sales workforce
  • Manage sales performance

Customer Management & Market Analysis

  • Conduct reporting of the sales activities and performance
  • Perform account monitoring and maintenance, Give feedback to Marketing, Product Development and Technical functions concerning trend of service need, market pricing and customer potential.

Sales & Campaign Management

  • Issue and Distribute Marketing Collaterals
  • Manage and track leads

Lead, initiate, and accomplish strategic project with strategic customers.

  • Initiate new project, conducting and lead the action involving marketing, presales, provisioning after-sales team.

Team collaboration

  • Execute and achieve functional goals given by Head of Division (Superior)
  • Work co-operatively with other team members to accomplished delegated tasks assigned by managers
  • Provide support, when appropriate, for the team in cases of absence or unavailability
  • Provide continuous inputs on business process and systems improvement

Requirements

Minimum Requirements

  • Minimum Bachelor Degree in any major
  • 7+ years of B2B Tech sales experience with experience in selling ICT, Telco products to financial services industries.
  • Previous experience as a sales executive, sales manager, account manager for multi segment, or presales/sales consultant/project management. Preferably coming from SI company have an engineering knowledge
  • Proven knowledge and experience in Techo solution
  • Proven ability in monitor and evaluate the performance, make recommendations and also ability to give right direction and use initiative and judgment
  • Having knowledge about the B2B business model and sales methodology
  • Good Networking and Engagement with Top Level in Financial Segment
  • Proven track record of achieving or exceeding sales targets
  • Experience managing mid-to-large accounts independently
  • Strong capability in end-to-end sales cycle
  • Solid negotiation and client management skills
  • Experience handling strategic or high-value accounts
  • Strong consultative selling and solution positioning capability
  • Ability to manage complex stakeholder environments
  • Good communication, negotiation, presentation, and report writing skills
  • Good analytical thinking
  • Demonstrated ability to build and maintain a strong sales pipeline
  • Flexible and adaptable in under pressure situations and meet short- and long-term deadlines
  • Able to use Microsoft office (excel, ppt, doc, etc)

title: Sr Officer-Enterprise Solution IOT
raw_description:
Job Details

Area of Responsibilities:

  • Perform presentations and demonstrations of solutions to potential and external clients. Support sales for meeting with customers.
  • Analyze clients' business and industry needs and propose solutions accordingly. Make a detailed and accurate analysis of business needs.
  • Provide technical support and consulting to clients and internal teams. Collaborating with external parties, vendors, and industry partners, to provide optimal solutions.
  • Monitor solution performance and make improvements according to client requirements. Generate & Monitor solution performance reports.
  • Increase industry knowledge and new technology to improve the solutions' quality. Competent and up-to-date industry knowledge.

 

Job:

  1. Understand customer needs and present Appropriate solutions From our product catalog
  2. Provide technical suport and consulting to clients and internal teams.
  3. Manage projects and coordinate with partners & technical teams to implement solutions.
  4. Monitor solution performance and make improvements according to client requirements.
  5. Support the development and implementation of marketing strategies.
  6. Increase industry knowledge and new technology to build future-proof solutions
  7. Provide market feedback to the product teams to ensure our solutions remain relevant
  8. Create, implement & report budgets and cost plans for managed projects.


Qualification:

  • Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree in business management in IT/Engineering or Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Informatics, and other related disciplines.

Related Experience:

  • At least 5 years of experience in a relevant portfolio.
  • Subject matter expertise in IoT and strong telecoms technical understanding.
  • Highly preferred coming from IT Services, IT Consultant, and System Integrator.
  • Being experienced in the Product and Presales team is a plus.

Skills:

  • Understanding of the IoT market: Familiarity with the current state of the IoT market and the various IoT solutions and technologies available, as well as an understanding of the key trends and developments in the space.
  • Business acumen: The ability to understand potential customers' business challenges and goals and translate those challenges into specific IoT solutions that can help the customer achieve their goals.
  • Technical expertise: A good understanding of the technical aspects of IoT solutions, including the devices, sensors, networking protocols, and software used in IoT solutions.
  • Communication skills: Strong presentation, negotiation, and communication skills are essential for effectively communicating the value of an IoT solution to potential customers.
  • Solution design: Understanding of IoT system design, integration, and deployment.
  • Proposal writing: Experience in writing proposals and responding to RFPs and RFIs.
  • Project management: Understanding project management methodologies and tools
  • Understanding of ROI and TCO calculations
  • Familiarity with IoT solution sales cycles, pricing models, and contract negotiation.

title: Officer-Sourcing Circle
raw_description:
Job Description

Manage end-to-end sourcing and procurement activities, including tender management, supplier selection, commercial negotiations, contract and purchase order administration, vendor performance management, and cost optimization, ensuring the best Total Cost of Ownership (TCO), timely project delivery, and alignment with business objectives.

 

Key Responsibilities

 

1. Sourcing & Tender Management

  • Manage end-to-end sourcing activities, including RFP/RFQ preparation, tender execution, supplier evaluation, and vendor selection.
  • Review and validate Bill of Quantities (BoQ) and Scope of Work (SoW) submitted by users.
  • Launch and manage tender processes through Coupa and other approved procurement platforms.
  • Coordinate with internal stakeholders and vendors throughout the procurement cycle.

2. Commercial Negotiation & Cost Optimization

  • Analyze supplier proposals and commercial bids.
  • Lead price, contract, and commercial negotiations to achieve targeted cost savings and optimal TCO.
  • Recommend vendor awards based on commercial, technical, quality, and performance considerations.
  • Support procurement initiatives that drive operational efficiency and cost reduction.

3. Contract & Purchase Order Management

  • Prepare and process Purchase Orders (POs) and contracts in accordance with company policies and timelines.
  • Monitor contract execution and vendor compliance.
  • Ensure timely delivery of procured products and services to support business requirements.

4. Vendor & Stakeholder Management

  • Maintain effective communication and relationships with suppliers and internal stakeholders.
  • Resolve vendor-related issues, including vendor blocking and performance concerns.
  • Act as the company's representative in external procurement and supplier engagements.

5. Reporting & Continuous Improvement

  • Prepare weekly procurement reports and ad-hoc reports as requested by management.
  • Support process improvement initiatives to enhance procurement effectiveness and efficiency.
  • Ensure compliance with procurement policies, procedures, and governance standards.

6. Team Collaboration

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to achieve departmental and organizational objectives.
  • Provide procurement support and guidance to business users.
  • Contribute to team initiatives and successfully deliver assigned tasks and projects.

Minimum Requirement

 

Qualification:

Bachelor's Degree in Finance, Economics, Information Technology, Engineering, or other relevant disciplines. Relevant postgraduate qualification will be an advantage.

 

Experience:

  • Minimum 1 year of relevant working experience in Procurement, Sourcing, Supply Chain, or related functions, with demonstrated negotiation skills and strong commercial acumen.
  • Experience in managing spend categories related to Sales & Marketing, such as BTL Printing, Branding, Event Activation, POSM, Media Placement, and similar categories.
  • Exposure to Network and Facility-related procurement categories will be an added advantage.

 

Skills:

  • Critical Thinking - Using logic and reasoning to identify the strengths and weaknesses of alternative solutions, conclusions, or approaches to problems.
  • Understand the business process as well as end to end process of RFP/RFQ system.
  • Able to work effectively with stakeholder, management, and suppliers  
  • Team player with good working conduct and ethics coupled with ability to manage pressure
  • Possess high standard of personal and professional integrity
  • Good of both written and spoken Bahasa Indonesia and English
  • Good in presentation skills both written & oral and be familiar with Microsoft Excel, Power Point and Word software

  • Critical Thinking - Using logic and reasoning to identify the strengths and weaknesses of alternative solutions, conclusions, or approaches to problems.
  • Understand the business process as well as end to end process of RFP/RFQ system.
  • Able to work effectively with stakeholder, management, and suppliers  
  • Team player with good working conduct and ethics coupled with ability to manage pressure
  • Possess high standard of personal and professional integrity
  • Good of both written and spoken Bahasa Indonesia and English
  • Good in presentation skills both written & oral and be familiar with Microsoft Excel, Power Point and Word software

title: AVP-Home Installation & Infrastructure
raw_description:
Long Description

Job Qualification:      
1. Education & Experience      
2. Bachelor’s degree in Telecommunications, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, or related field  
3. Minimum 8–12 years of experience in telecommunications, preferably in broadband (FTTH/FWA) operations, installation, or network operations
4. Proven experience in managing vendors/partners and large-scale field execution    
5. Technical & Functional Competencies    
Strong understanding of:      
1. HBB technologies (FTTH, FWA, last-mile infrastructure)    
2. Installation processes, provisioning, and activation lifecycle    
3. Network troubleshooting and incident management    
4. Experience in SLA management, service delivery governance, and performance tracking    
5. Familiarity with ticketing systems, workforce management tools, and network monitoring systems  
6. Ability to analyze operational data and drive continuous improvement initiatives    

 

Long Description

The AVP, HBB Infrastructure & Installation (Circle), is responsible for leading end-to-end Home Broadband service delivery, installation operations, and infrastructure readiness across the circle. The role ensures timely customer activation, high installation quality, network reliability, and effective post-installation support while meeting business, operational, and customer experience targets.The position provides strategic leadership to field operations, technical teams, and service partners to drive operational excellence, SLA achievement, customer satisfaction, and sustainable subscriber growth. Through strong governance, performance management, and continuous improvement initiatives, the role ensures efficient execution, service quality, and long-term business success.

title: AVP-Core Performance
raw_description:
Role Purpose

Ensuring the performance of core network (KPI & KQI) at the best performance level.

Establishing and maintaining performance frameworks and using this to drive the core network improvements.

Maintaining the customer experience index by delivering the best core network performance, including but not limited to top apps latency & packet loss, crowd sourcing platform report, and service operation related activity.

 

Job Description

 

Key Performance and Key Quality Indicators

-    Understanding the key elements of KPI and KQI of CS and PS Core Nodes,
-    Performing analysis on the root cause as well as the solution of any performance degradations,
-    Capacity utilization assessment and strategic improvement plan.

 

Core Network Performance Optimization

-    Analysis and optimization of Core Network parameters,
-    Proposal initiatives to improve the network performance, considering the business and commercial aspects

 

Core Network Reporting

-    Routine monitoring for core network performance and provide insights to the correlated functions, 
-    Data assessment to support commercial or business team requirement.

 

Customer Satisfaction Contribution

-    Establish strategic plan to improve the network performance which contribute to customer experience index

 

Qualification:
-    Min bachelor’s degree in Information Technology

Experience:
-    6 to 12 years of relevant experience in CS and PS Core nodes,

Skills:
-    Knowledge of Data Core Networks (2G, 3G, 4G, VoLTE)
-    Application of statistical analysis within performance
-    Understanding of CS and PS Core networks and associated technologies
-    2G/3G/4G end to end design elements

  1.

title: AVP-Radio Performance (Non Java)
raw_description:
Role Purpose

-    Responsible to define, develop, and review to continuously improving in the operation of cellular and corporate network to manage network service within a defined SLA.
-    Lead optimization to maintain/improve customer experience within defined KPI.
-    Responsible to keep up with global trends and technology update, understand business direction and develop principles and selection method accordingly for the most suitable partner and technology.
-    Responsible to support Regulatory and Kominfo data requirement and test case 
-    Responsible to manage and support pre and post project activity within the target KPI to be agreed

 

Job Descriptiom

 

Domain

Manage RAN optimization

Solution Development

-    define and provide principles and selection method accordingly for the most suitable operational aspect.
-    detailing operational aspect related to RAN optimizations 

 

Radio optimization area

-    responsible regional network quality KPI.
-    coordinate all clusters in regional and distribute network quality KPI target each cluster. 
-    monitor, evaluate & execute method to get effective process, make recommendations to Superior and implement actions, such as improvement tools, additional resources, etc

 

Management

-    Manage team include MS and Project team
-    Coordinate with regulatory, Sales, Project, and Planning

Qualification:
-    Min bachelor’s degree with major study in Electrical / Telecommunication Engineering / Information System

Experience:
-    Minimum 5 years’ experience in Telecommunication industry, especially cellular operational solution
-    Has a good experience in cellular optimizations is advantage.
-    Experience in leading on any telecommunication project

Skills:
-    Good leadership capability.
-    Good communication in both Bahasa Indonesia and English.
-    Good technical writing and reporting.
-    Good presentation and persuasion skill capabilities.
-    Good knowledge of telecommunication business in general and Understanding RAN 2G/3G/4G/5G
-    Good understanding in general and specific business process within the business users
-    Customer focus
-    Good in teamwork
